highlights.summary:
The MAT 2026 exam result for admission to the MBA course for the CBT and the PBT modes will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.8 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Does MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women has been rated 3.8 on placements.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women has been rated 4.2 on Infrastructure parameter. Institute offers great infrastructure with facilities such as Auditorium, Cafeteria, Gym, Labs, Library, Sports Complex to students. MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women has also been rated 4.2 for Campuslife.

placements.overview:
MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women, is located in Pune, Maharashtra. Established in 1996, it is a private institute approved by AICTE. MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women provides 1 PG course in several specialisations. This programme is offered in Full Time mode. MBA/PGDM is some of the course offered at MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women. Some of the stream in which this course is offered include Business & Management Studies. The total fee at MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women is INR 3,38,260. MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women has a student intake of 180 for all the courses. MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women offers a wide range of programmes at PG level. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the PG stage, courses available include MBA/PGDM. MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women fee structure was INR 3,38,260.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women offers a wide range of programmes at PG level. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the PG stage, courses available include MBA/PGDM. MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women fee structure was INR 3,38,260.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of placements. Other facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are provided only for a few specialisations. Around 60% of the students got internships through college, and almost 40% of the students were placed with the average salary package. They were hired as trainees and interns. Only students from a few specialisations have visited other companies. The college has its own placement cell, and it is not helpful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The college provides all the facilities, and even the facilities provided in the hostel are good. There are no issues with the infrastructure. There are two IT labs available in our college, and the college also has a big library. There is a digital library, and they also provide a reading room facility. Medical facilities are also available. Canteen is also available, and the quality of food offered is the best. Classrooms are good, and every classroom is equipped with a projector. The college also provides the Wi-Fi facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely a great college for women as they encourage you in all the fields.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good with the MNC, But students preferred to go with small scale industry as they give more experience. For placements they provide the grooming sessions and always helps with the placement rounds. The placement officer is a so helpful. She always help you with all the difficulties you face in the placement process.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great with a well-equipped computer lab and a good collection of books in the library. The canteen is under maintenance of sankalp group of ladies who will provide you with a good food and great taste. The classrooms are having in build projectors which are always helpful in teaching for the staff.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Best College. The teachers are quite motivating. Our director Dr. Jagdish Paul, the best supporter and backbone of our institute, proud to be his student. It is not just a college for learning subjects, it’s a mixture of academic as well as cultural activities. The two mega events like “KUSHAGRA” and “PANACHE” are the best to learn and gain knowledge. The Faculty Members over here are quite coordinative in nature, they know what each and every student need from them, so they are the biggest plus point of our institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2005
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: I am fortunate being student of HNIMR. I always wished good Placement Support in the campus. In recent visit, I observed positive advancement of HNIMR and especially drastic change in our Placement Support activities. It was nice to interact with Director Sir, faculty members and Placement officer to plan and execute training and internship programs for the MBA students. The focused activities of placement cell and improved number of campus placements is really appreciable.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: HNIMR Institute is one of the best institute to grow with. The college building is pretty modern in terms of its facilities. The classrooms have comfortable benches and projectors. There is a vast library with books of all the possible streams of management available at any odd hours as well. The teaching is at a premium level, professors having immense knowledge related to their subjects. The teachers here are highly experienced & college has a facility for guest lectures as well. Various activities and events are conducted round the year. Students get on campus internship offers from excellent companies during their second year and placement offers as well. I was very fortunate to complete my internship at Volkswagen, thanks to placement cell.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The curriculum at HNIMR is extremely beneficial for ensuring development and awareness of practical and theoretical knowledge. Periodic tests are conducted to encourage continuous learning and importance is given to cultural activities too, to keep up the spirit and liveliness of their students.

The cutoff was released in the form of percentiles for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. This page contains MKSS's Smt. Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs for various rounds and categories. More exam-related updates are below:

Hiraben Nanavati Institute of Management and Research for Women for MBA/PGDM. In 2025, the cutoff percentile for MBA/PGDM admission was closed at 53.99 for the General AI category candidates. Looking at the cutoff rank for previous year, the cutoff percentile for the same course was 45.45 in 2023. Mor

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and MBBS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore programmes is around INR 37,500 to 3,52,500.

faqs.answer: A:    Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore are Automobile Engineering, Communications Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Structural Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Choosing LNCT College for my education has been a decision I regret.

review_content.Placements: I'm quite disappointed with my college experience. It can be frustrating when expectations aren't met. As a final-year student at LNCT College, I would like to share my thoughts on the good and bad aspects of my college, as well as the admission process and criteria.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college lacks basic facilities. There are no adequate resources to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. The management of the college is very poor. There is a lack of organization and efficiency in handling student affairs. No Wi-Fi, poor labs, average classrooms—everything is disappointing. No canteen is there; I don't know about medical facilities; there are no sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore.

review_content.Placements: About 50% to 60% of students were placed. The minimum salary package was 1.5 LPA, and the maximum was 4 LPA. Companies from Indore came here for mechanical students. Companies like Tech Mahindra, HP, HCL, etc. from other places like Pune came for IT students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. Hostel facilities were not good. The hostel building was old. No students lived there. There was no canteen. Sports and games facilities were good. Our college participated in inter-college competitions.

review_summary.college_name: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College with good degree, but no placements.

content.Placements: There were no placements, and some placements they offered were just for the sake of showing in a very low-level startup company that was not earning itself, and for trainee roles. Otherwise, there was no focus on placements in this college. The degree was from RGPV, and this was the reason I joined this college. The placements were not good here. So, keep it in mind.
content.Infrastructure: College and lab infrastructure were good, but hostel was not good. Labs were very good with updated computers, an airy room, and lab assistants were also there. But the college hostel was not good, very low-quality rooms, not even labour class people could live there, still some students were living for the sake of less money.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The worst college, most of it is a waste of money, with no placements.

content.Placements: Placements are very low. The highest package was 3.6 LPA and the lowest was 1.8 LPA, and there was almost no support from the college placement cell. Most of the professors were also carefree and didn't put too much effort into teaching the students. Placements were the worst, and I have never seen worse placements than here.
content.Infrastructure: The building is too old with almost no amenities, and there is no maintenance of things. There were projectors, but they did not work, and the floors were broken. There is always some construction going on in the campus. Parking was not proper, and the canteen was sometimes open and mostly closed, and didn’t offer any good food.

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of many reasons and the average placements in 2022.

content.Placements: In our college, around 30% of students are placed in MNCs. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, and many more MNCs visit our campus. A maximum of one student gets a free online internship, and if they want an offline internship, they must pay for it. The top role offered is the developer.

paragraphs: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CAT for admission to specific courses.Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indoreoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 66 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,20,000 - 3,52,500. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 55,000 - 62,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LNCT (Bhopal) Indore campus.
reviews.review_text: A hostel facility is available in our college. Our college has an excellent hostel facility, rooms, and a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel. There is no ragging. The campus is greenery. There is a food court on campus. The rooms and the food are very low. For everything, we have to pay for our own. Sports classes are held every week. They have books. Our memory is sharp to learn theories so you can read and learn from the book only and no practical things.

reviews.review_heading: If you take admission in this college then it will be good for your career.
reviews.review_text: The Hostel is very good. Boys are allotted hostels in the campus itself for one year only while girls are allotted hostels for four years. It has four hostel buildings, two for boys and two for girls. The room quality is very good, it's more like a three-star hotel. Each room has its attached washroom, a balcony of decent size. Three students are accommodated in each room. Mess food is between intermediate and good. One can't expect much from mess food. The hostel fee is also affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are separate buildings for MBA and BA. The campus is good. There is a huge library. Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are spacious enough for students. The hostel is good enough, and the food quality is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college rating is average .
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is extremely good and there are many class room and having smart classes facilities. There is quite low facilities for students like there is no purified water and no Wi-Fi connection. The quality of food is average and the facilities of hostel is also average.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of LNCT Indore.
reviews.review_text: Our course infrastructure is designed according to today's industrial needs. We have well qualified and experienced teachers. We have good facilities of Wi-Fi, computer lab and a well-maintained library where students find their desired books. The infrastructure of our hostel is pretty good, and the quality of the food available in the mess is quite satisfying compared to other mess facilities. Basic medical facilities are available in our college. There are several sports events organised by ou...

reviews.review_heading: It is an above-average college, and some things need to be improved.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, ground, auditorium, sports complex, canteen and all the labs. The infrastructure is good. The food quality is not impressive. The college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. It is well maintained with all the facilities in the classrooms, laboratories, libraries, sports center and hostel. The hostel provides Wi-Fi facilities as well. The area is clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with college because of many reasons.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided at our college are not very excellent, but its infrastructure is excellent. Food served in the mess is moderately good, but there is no canteen in the LNCT, Indore. Medical facilities provided are good.  Sports facilities are moderate. Overall, some facilities are very poor, and some are moderate.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and all the facilities like Wi-Fi campus and labs are available. Classrooms are very spacious, with smart classes. The hostel facilities are normal, but there are problems in mess and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The library is huge, and almost 500 students can study at a time. Wi-Fi facility is also available in college and hostel. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. individual_reviews.title: Teachers are the best for the study, and they teach students well.

content.Placements: Placement of this college includes most of the sales companies that get the students only from the 4 to 5 top companies, like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. They come here to get the students. Also, the highest and average package is 47.6 LPA, and the average is around 8 to 9 LPA, which provides this college a good placement percentage.
content.Infrastructure: The college does not have any hostel of its own. You have to live in PG or private hostels. In those hostels, you have the tiffin system. You get the breakfast and dinner tiffin from the person you are taking from, and you have to pay the charges of tiffin monthly. The rates of tiffin services start from 1600 -3000 per month, according to the quality of food. The average rent for the PG or room is 1800-2500 per month.

reviews.review_text: In our department, facilities like free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, biometric attendance, lifts, 24x7 camera surveillance, and many more facilities are available. Classrooms consist of smart screens and full air conditioning with a capacity for more than 150 students to sit there. The food quality in our canteen is good. Wi-Fi support is also there. Sports and games events are regularly organised in our course at regular intervals. Free mode of transportation is also available in the Jabal...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college in the city, based on its academics and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our department, free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, biometric attendance, lifts, 24/7 camera surveillance, and many more facilities are available. The classrooms consist of smart screens, full air conditioning, and a capacity for more than 150 students to sit. The food quality in our canteen is good. Sports and games events are regularly organized in our course at regular intervals. Free mode of transportation is also available in the Jabalpur region.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in city, because of its academics and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our department, free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, biometric attendance, lifts, 24X7 camera surveillance, global app for payments and complaints, and many more facilities are available. Classrooms consist smart screens, fully air-conditioning, capacity for more than 150 students to sit. The food quality in our canteen is good. The sports and games events are regularly organised in our course at regular intervals. Free mode of transportation is also available in the Jabalpur region.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are the best for the study, and they teach students well.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have any hostel of its own. You have to live in PG or private hostels. In those hostels, you have the tiffin system. You get the breakfast and dinner tiffin from the person you are taking from, and you have to pay the charges of tiffin monthly. The rates of tiffin services start from 1600 -3000 per month, according to the quality of food. The average rent for the PG or room is 1800-2500 per month.

reviews.review_heading: Good internship from Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully equipped with well-conditioned AC, and the benches are very good. The classrooms have good lighting. The facility of girls' hostel is available, but not of boys' hostel. The canteen is very big and neat and clean, but the sports and games facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Truth - the truth of the college .
reviews.review_text: As per campus, this is the best infrastructure in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. The campus has Wi-Fi, and the library is full of books. Labs for different subjects are also available. But the hostel is the cons in this segment because there is no facility for boys' hostel in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and a great college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of my college are awesome. The nature and environment are amazing. I'm very grateful to be here. In the hostel, sometimes I face a problem with the food because the food made in the mess is too oily and sometimes difficult to eat, but I think it's not that bad.

reviews.review_heading: Sharing experiences of first year.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is very good. There are several blocks for each department. There is a small canteen and a playground. The classroom has ACs and good lighting and the benches are comfortable. There is a hostel for girls only. There is NCC facility for interested students.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were good in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of this college are amazing. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the college. There are 6 ACs in every classroom, and the labs are in very good condition. The hostel facilities are also available in this college, and the mess is also available.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. Infrastructure is good. Teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are well-cleaned and there is AC in every room. There is an average playground in college. There is no hostel yet but in the future, there will be. Canteen is small,  but a new canteen work is in progress. Wi-Fi connectivity is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is value for money, and placements are pretty good. The fests and curriculum are average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good as compared to other institutes in Jabalpur. Classrooms are literally so good. The Computer Science block is full of Wi-Fi facilities, but unfortunately, there is no hostel on campus for boys. A girls' hostel was opened last week, so I cannot provide any kind of review about it.

reviews.review_heading: In the end, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connectivity is good, providing at least 600mbps speed. Classrooms are very clean, with good lighting for student vision and AC in every classroom. Library books are free for students. No hostels are available yet, but in the future, there will be. Buses are free.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facility of this college is very good as every classroom has around 6 ACs and also the Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the college. The quality of the hostel is not available in this college and commerce and canteen facilities are also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are excellent in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of this college are very good. The classrooms are well-equipped with 6 ACs. Also, the classroom college type in which there are rows up by up. There are various types of sports activities but there is no hostel facility.

faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Institute of Administrative Studies (IASINDIA, Bihar) for BBA?

faqs.answer: To apply for the MBA at IASINDIA, you fill out the application form with your academic details. Then, you take an entrance exam testing general knowledge, reasoning, and management basics. After that, there's a personal interview to assess your motivation for the course. Selection is based on your exam score, interview, and academic background. Experience in administration or the social sector is a plus. If selected, you'll receive an offer letter and must pay fees to confirm your admission.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process for MBA at Institute of Administrative Studies (IASINDIA, Bihar)?

faqs.answer: Application end dates to join the Institute of Administrative Studies, IASINDIA Bihar depends on the upcoming session usually it's between June 15 to July 31. For the BBA programs, the deadlines for admission are by May 31, while for MBA programs they are June 30. That notwithstanding, the specific dates may differ according to the programme and academic session. In order to be sure about the application deadline one should either contact admissions office of IASINDIA or refer to the official announcements made either in April or May.

faqs.answer: To get direct admission at the Institute of Administrative Studies (IASINDIA, Bihar), you should visit their official website and fill out the application form. review_summary.college_name: Jyoti Nivas College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Well known institution and not fulfilling the standards in this era

content.Placements: The approachability of various companies on campus for on-campus recruitment was restricted to only the companies with a package greater than three or above LPAs. This reduces the complexity in the count by lowering the placement records. Only 32 to 40 percent of companies arrived for our department, which was most disappointing.
content.Infrastructure: The college was ranked in a good position. They had received a lot of appraisals and trophies from various college events. Access to sources like Wi-Fi facilities and others is limited to students. The libraries are not maintained properly, and it was difficult to find required books immediately due to the lack of maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (History, English, Sociology) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Fantastic facilities and teaching staff.

content.Placements: There is quite a lot in my course, mostly for UPSC exams. The course offers a lot of placements, but since many are doing UPSC exams, not many take up the placements. Archeology and NGOs visit our college. The two main roles offered for my course are teachers and entrepreneurs.
content.Infrastructure: The library has everything you need for my courses, and the departments also have good books to offer. Classrooms can be a little bit organised. Hostels and canteens are not that great as they lack space.
content.Faculty: The teachers are the best, they are so helpful and understanding. They are very friendly and loving. They teach us beyond the courses, along with the values of life. They don't get tired of teaching us if we lack understanding. The exams could be pretty hard, although.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The happiest environment to study.

content.Placements: We did not require any help from the placement team for finding out internships because it was a busy city with enormous opportunities, and looking for candidates to work with them. Yet, colleges find a lot of impressive companies with the best package results like average package above 5 LPA to 8 LPA only.
content.Infrastructure: It was a private institution that was established more than 50 years ago, still looks like a new one with frequent renovations carried out. Our college offered post-graduate and undergraduate courses in various specialisations like humanities, arts, and science.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jyoti Nivas College.

content.Placements: There are campus placement sessions where the most reputed companies come for recruitment. Students can also pursue content writing and editing. It also includes media jobs or mass communication-related jobs. News media and digital marketing companies offer jobs to students of English. Companies such as Paytm, IBM, and freelancers are called to recruit students. A large number of students are selected. Many new companies are starting to visit the college. The average package is around 2-4 lakhs. You will regularly get various internship programs almost every month.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: The placement cell is ruled by our sociology teacher and it was such a bad excuse for a placement cell. The college made me close slightly to my plans. As said before, this college lacks placements. Very few companies come here to recruit. Some are Goldman Sachs, EY, Delloitte, Range, and Wipro. The packages are not that great. The highest package is 3 LPA this year and the least is 1.5 LPA. To conclude, the placements are not as expected here.
content.Infrastructure: There are hostel facilities within the campus itself. The hostel facility is good (not great) and reasonable too. The food provided in the hostel is amazing. They have just recently built a new canteen which provides us everything required. Stationery, toiletries, etc., are also available in the small malls within the canteen itself. The course curriculum is a bit loose but the gaps are matched via the interaction with other department students.

The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple disciplines, including Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education, Banking and Finance and Insurance, and more. AtJyoti Nivas College, candidates are selected based on their academic merit. The application forms are available online at the official website of the university. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

description: Jyoti Nivas College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Jyoti Nivas College Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 21455 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 6798 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

reviews.review_heading: Well known institution and not fulfilling the standards in this era
reviews.review_text: The college was ranked in a good position. They had received a lot of appraisals and trophies from various college events. Access to sources like Wi-Fi facilities and others is limited to students. The libraries are not maintained properly, and it was difficult to find required books immediately due to the lack of maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Fantastic facilities and teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: The library has everything you need for my courses, and the departments also have good books to offer. Classrooms can be a little bit organised. Hostels and canteens are not that great as they lack space.

reviews.review_heading: The happiest environment to study.
reviews.review_text: It was a private institution that was established more than 50 years ago, still looks like a new one with frequent renovations carried out. Our college offered post-graduate and undergraduate courses in various specialisations like humanities, arts, and science.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jyoti Nivas College.
reviews.review_text: It is an autonomous university. The syllabus and corrections are handled in-house. The teaching staff is good, with a balanced co-curricular program. The course structure is well designed to benefit all students. Mid-week assessments are a regular method teachers use to evaluate students. The college has a girls' hostel that is well-equipped with all necessary amenities. The food provided has a variety on the menu every day for hostel girls. There is proper monitoring of health and hygiene, alon...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: There are hostel facilities within the campus itself. The hostel facility is good (not great) and reasonable too. The food provided in the hostel is amazing. They have just recently built a new canteen which provides us everything required. Stationery, toiletries, etc., are also available in the small malls within the canteen itself. The course curriculum is a bit loose but the gaps are matched via the interaction with other department students.

reviews.review_heading: I have given information about studies, faculty, campus, placement offers, and extra activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is absolutely amazing in our college. There is very good interior design, and very good environment with a lot of trees around the campus. The canteen is like a 5-star hotel where we can get everything. Labs are everything good, and a lot of opportunities in sports. There is a medical room in case of injuries happen. Totally, it is a very amazing infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: JNC - Let your light shine.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are highly equipped. The food, mess and canteen are very clean and well-maintained around the campus. It is helpful for students' health. The library is well-equipped to sit with friends and discuss the subjects.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the quality and the infrastructure of Jyotiba College autonomous.
reviews.review_text: Libraries are amazing. They have facilities that include Wi-Fi, laptops, reference books, and a variety of question banks. Our college has a cafeteria. It is amazing. Students can get food and everything. Hostel facilities are amazing. Sports and everything are available.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and surroundings are nice.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are huge. The atmosphere of the college is very peaceful and chill. They have medical facilities. Students get a variety of food in the cafeteria. They have shops to buy accessories, food, pens, notebooks, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the campus is very important to study, which is very calm and nice.
reviews.review_text: There are many fests, events, and annual festivals held in my college. The accessibility of books is very good; there are many books of different authors on the same subject for practice. Even technological benefits are given in the college. There are many fields for extracurricular activities to increase credits. And also, there are many clubs which provide social, environmental, and cultural help to society.

reviews.review_heading: There are various skill development courses complimentary to the main course subject.
reviews.review_text: I live in a nearby PG whose rent is 10200 for double seater for a month. The  hostel facilities are only provided for the Christian, Catholic students. There were a lot of PGs nearby so it wasn't any difficult  to occupy our comfortable rooms in PGs.

reviews.review_heading: College days at Jyoti Nivas College.
reviews.review_text: It's a hi-tech college with all the necessary facilities. Throughout my college life, I spent most of my time in the hostel rooms. During semester holidays, I didn't like to go home, but it's compulsory to vacate the hostel during holidays.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college in terms of placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: Based on the students' decision, food recipes will be decided. We may able to get non-vegetarian food items thrice in a week. The hostellers should be on-time to the college hostel. If we are facing any medical issues, they allow us to take rest in hostel rooms. Medical facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jyoti Nivas College, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: I've really enjoyed the culture of the college. There will be good coordination between juniors and seniors due to various events/fests. Considering the students necessities, we were supported with all the facilities, and our management made such facilities for us.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent in our college. There Are many facilities provided by college management. They provide good Wi-Fi connectivity for labs and provide digital classrooms. They provide hostel facility and medical facilities. There is a big ground to play sports.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Department of PG Studies, Visvesvaraya Technological University, Mysuru offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Department of PG Studies, Visvesvaraya Technological University, Mysuru offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    Department of PG Studies, Visvesvaraya Technological University, Mysuru provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Structural Engineering, Power Engineering, Industrial Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does Department of PG Studies, Visvesvaraya Technological University, Mysuru offer?

faqs.answer:
A:    Department of PG Studies, Visvesvaraya Technological University, Mysuru has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalent and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates).
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.MCACandidate must have passed any recognised BCA / Bachelor degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent degree and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates) taken together in all the subjects in all the years of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
OR
Candidate must have passed B.Sc. / B.Com / B.A. with Mathematics at 10 + 2 level or at Graduation level (with additional bridge courses as per the norms of the concerned University) and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks

content.Placements: Only 5% of students are placed at Visvesvaraya Technological University, Mysore. The highest package was 4 lakh, the lowest was 2 lakh, and the average package is around 3 lakh. The top recruiting companies for the MBA course are Accenture and Smart Bazar. content.Infrastructure: The facilities are almost great and are maintained in a clean manner. The college has a great campus on 8 acres of land. highlights.summary: Sidho-Kanho-Birsha University PG courses 2023 classes commenced on Oct 3, 2023.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good, but there are some good and bad aspects of the college.

review_content.Placements: There is no proper placement. I hear from some seniors that students can get fairly good placements. It is very difficult to get placements without skills. But I hear from seniors that students with good graduation results can get good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is okay, but it is old. Rooms are small. Beds are outdated. The water system is not good. The food and hostel atmosphere are not good. I try to get a hostel, but I still cannot find one.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty is good. The effort to conduct exams is good, but the questions are difficult. Teachers are often angry with students. Students are confused because what is taught in classes is different from what appears in exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: “Supportive teachers, good campus life and practical learning in BCA at Raghunathpur College”

review_content.Placements: In Raghunathpur College, the BCA course placement is decent. Around 7-75% of students from our batch got placed. The highest package was around 8-10 LPA, the lowest was 2.5-3 LPA, and the average package was close to 4-5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini. Nearly 50-60% students also got internships in companies like Cognizant, Deloitte, and HCL. The major roles offered were software developer, web developer, system analyst, and technical support engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Raghunathpur College offers a good BCA course with supportive faculty and proper lab facilities. The hostel is clean, safe, and provides basic amenities with hygienic food. Overall, it gives a study-friendly and affordable environment for students. Good.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear the All India Bar Examination (AIBE). faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

answer.text: The salary prospects in the Law profession are based on the job role, position, employer, experience, and skills. Also, in India, Lawyers are generally paid based on the cases they handle; the number of full-time hired Advocates is less. You'll find some full-time hired Advocates in MNCs or in government organizations only; the remaining ones work more as consultants. These salaries can be: Job ProfilesAverage SalaryLitigation LawyersINR 5-15 LPACorporate LawyersINR 6-20 LPATax LawyersINR 6-15 LPAIntellectual Property LawyersINR 6-15 LPAM&A LawyersINR 8-20 LPALegal CounselsINR 8-20 LPACompliance OfficersINR 6-12 LPAContract ManagersINR 6-12 LPAPublic ProsecutorsINR 8-15 LPALegal AdvisorsINR 8-12 LPAJudicial OfficersINR 6-12 LPALegal ConsultantsINR 5-12 LPALegal AnalystsINR 5-8 LPALegal Process Outsourcing (LPO)INR 4-8 LPA Note- The above salary has been taken from external sources, and hence may vary.

faqs.question: What are the salary prospects for Law professionals in India?

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

review_summary.college_name: Sidho-Kanho-Birsha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has a nice campus, decent facilities, and improving placement opportunities.

content.Placements: From BIST Purulia, around 70 percent of students get placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the average package is 3.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and Cognizant. Nearly 60 percent of students got internships in IT firms. Common roles offered are developer, analyst, and support engineer.
content.Infrastructure: My department has good facilities, including Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, computer labs, and access to a well-stocked library with books and digital resources. Labs are functional and useful for practical learning. The hostel provides basic but clean rooms with regular water and decent Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic. The canteen offers affordable snacks. Medical support includes first-aid and access to a nearby hospital. The college also provides sports facilities like cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent course and supportive staff, but it needs modern upgrades.

content.Placements: 60% students are placed from campus drives. The highest package is 7.2 LPA, the lowest is 2.4 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. Top recruiters are Axis Bank and ICICI Bank (mainly banking/finance firms). 95% students reported getting internships, many with Axis Bank and ICICI Bank. Frequent roles offered are banking-staff, cashier/clerk or entry-level operations/manager-trainee positions.
content.Infrastructure: The BCA department has Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms and a library. The campus has a canteen with decent food. Reviews about hostels are mixed, with some saying none are available. Sports events are held yearly, but medical facilities are basic.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good, but there are some good and bad aspects of the college.

content.Placements: There is no proper placement. I hear from some seniors that students can get fairly good placements. It is very difficult to get placements without skills. But I hear from seniors that students with good graduation results can get good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is okay, but it is old. Rooms are small. Beds are outdated. The water system is not good. The food and hostel atmosphere are not good. I try to get a hostel, but I still cannot find one.
content.Faculty: Faculty is good. The effort to conduct exams is good, but the questions are difficult. Teachers are often angry with students. Students are confused because what is taught in classes is different from what appears in exams.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: “Supportive teachers, good campus life and practical learning in BCA at Raghunathpur College”

content.Placements: In Raghunathpur College, the BCA course placement is decent. Around 7-75% of students from our batch got placed. The highest package was around 8-10 LPA, the lowest was 2.5-3 LPA, and the average package was close to 4-5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini. Nearly 50-60% students also got internships in companies like Cognizant, Deloitte, and HCL. The major roles offered were software developer, web developer, system analyst, and technical support engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Raghunathpur College offers a good BCA course with supportive faculty and proper lab facilities. The hostel is clean, safe, and provides basic amenities with hygienic food. Overall, it gives a study-friendly and affordable environment for students. Good.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Socialogy - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Brief review of our university.

content.Placements: Although our university is a general degree university but still our placement and training cell arranges placement drives occasionally. Many students get the chance to do a job with a very good salary in companies that come for the placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: There are sufficient benches for the students. 24X7 electricity is available and drinking water is available in all departments. Central library of our university has a huge collection of books for every subject. Medicine for minor diseases is available in our utility building. You can eat food at very cheap price in the canteen.

paragraphs: Sidho-Kanho-Birsha University admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Sidho-Kanho-Birsha University, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science and Teaching and Education.

Some of the popular Sidho-Kanho-Birsha University programmes are B.A. and B.A. (Hons), etc at UG level and M.Sc. and M.A. at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Sidho-Kanho-Birsha University admissions:

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

highlights.summary:
The AP ICET 2026 registration portal will now remain open for the Vikrama Simhapuri University admission to the MBA/PGDM course till Mar 17, 2026, without a late fee. The exam for the same is scheduled to take place on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vikrama Simhapuri University is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The fee structure for the Vikrama Simhapuri University programmes is around INR 16,720 to 1,00,000.

Many IT companies offer internships through the college. In this placement campus, there is one condition required: 6 CGPA marks are compulsory for participation.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college's infrastructure is very good, and it uses high-quality materials for everything. It provides multiple facilities such as neat and clean bathrooms, classrooms, labs, library, garden, gymkhana, hostel, etc. The college provides these facilities. The canteen food is very tasty and delicious.

reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and Relevant curriculum with decent placements.

Top recruiters include Dr. Reddy's and Divis Labs. Around 40% secured internships. Common roles offered are Quality Analyst and Lab Technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is basic. The facilities need updating. Classrooms and the library are decent, but Wi-Fi is unreliable. Hostel facilities are average; rooms are clean, but the food in the mess is just okay. Medical facilities are minimal, and sports options are limited. Overall, it's adequate but not exceptional.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

While performing arts provide options in acting, dancing, directing, and producing, visual arts and design offer pathways like graphic design, illustration, and art direction. Digital marketing experts, social media managers, and content producers are common positions in the field of digital media and communication.Options for authorship, content development, and journalism are presented by writing and journalism. Furthermore, curators of galleries or museums are included in the field of arts administration. An arts degree's adaptability enables people to work in a variety of sectors, bringing creativity and critical thinking to disciplines like media and entertainment, design, and administration.Read more about - ⁠BPA Course

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in all courses. Rs. 25,000 was the highest and lowest. The top recruiting company is the Sri City company for your course. 50% of students got internships from the course at various companies. Top roles offered include system admin and teachers.

Hostel students are not allowed to use mobiles in the hostel, and non-veg food is not permitted in the mess.

admission_process.title: Vikrama Simhapuri University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vikrama Simhapuri University admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Vikrama Simhapuri University considers scores in AP EAMCET, AP PGCET, and APICET for admission to specific courses.Vikrama Simhapuri Universityoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 5 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years - 5 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,00,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 16,720 - 54,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vikrama Simhapuri University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by D.K. Government College for WomenReviewed on 30 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has NAAC A+ grades and is an autonomous institution.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi facility infrastructure is available for your course department, classrooms, or library. Everything related to hostels, food, mess, and canteen is of very good quality; medical facilities and sports and games are also very attractive.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Duvvuru Ramanamma Women’s CollegeReviewed on 17 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: We are most excited about the annual day because of its wonderful celebration.
reviews.review_text: Hostels charge Rs. 3000 monthly, which includes food bills based on the total number of students. Each student must pay their share between the 5th and 15th of the month. Hostel students are not allowed to use mobiles in the hostel, and non-veg food is not permitted in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Vikrama Simhapuri University College in M.Sc. Course Admission.
reviews.review_text: This college's infrastructure is very good, and it uses high-quality materials for everything. It provides multiple facilities such as neat and clean bathrooms, classrooms, labs, library, garden, gymkhana, hostel, etc. The college provides these facilities. The canteen food is very tasty and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and Relevant curriculum with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basic. The facilities need updating. Classrooms and the library are decent, but Wi-Fi is unreliable. Hostel facilities are average; rooms are clean, but the food in the mess is just okay. Medical facilities are minimal, and sports options are limited. Overall, it's adequate but not exceptional.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Degree and Post Graduate College, NelloreReviewed on 23 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A college having a good environment  for Nellore district people.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not allowed to be used by the students. Separate computer labs are provided. The ground floor has a library containing many books. No hostel was provided by the college, we have to get an accommodation outside the campus and make sure it’s near the campus at a walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, faculty and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good at our college. Every block has good Wi-Fi connectivity, and a well-stocked library is present. They provide digital classrooms. The hostel is average and the food is also average. Sports and games occur twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: Vikramasimha puri university has the best campus, good faculty and placements and I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure will be available with good facilities including labs, Wi-Fi classrooms, library, and maintenance quality food in the mess, good quality and quantity food in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports ground, and total facilities in the college and course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Degree and Post Graduate College, NelloreReviewed on 13 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very less festivals happen in our college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure: The campus is good. All types of facilities like the canteen, library, and labs are available in our college. The quality of labs is good. There is no hostel facility inside our college. The campus offers a friendly atmosphere, and there is a good parking place in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 30 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It gives a good college life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were very good and the rooms were sufficient for 2 students. Every room consisted of a bed, 2 boards, bathrooms, and toilets. The quality of food in the mess was good. Registration for the hostel was done at the time of the admission process. The rooms in the locality were not costly. Room rent was Rs.4,000 to Rs.5,000. Our college had a fully furnished library with all the books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vaishnavi College of Arts And ScienceReviewed on 28 Mar 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good environment and space.
reviews.review_text: Vaishnavi College has given us all the necessary equipment. As I'm from B.Com branch, I have seen computer applications with everything installed in them. The central library is very useful. We can find many books and resources in the library. We have Wi-Fi with a good network connection. Our hostels are clean. They provide hygienic and well-maintained food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Degree and Post Graduate College, NelloreReviewed on 13 Feb 2023)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college were good with a good environment. Labs, computer labs, library, etc. , were available in our college. Food served in the hostel was good, tasty, and healthy. Canteen and mess were well-maintained with good hygiene quality. Medical facilities were available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Sri Vema Degree CollegeReviewed on 12 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teaching staff. Reasonable fees are charged.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well designed but there are less facilities like no Wi-Fi in the campus, very small labs, limited staff. But teaching is good for computer subject. Other than that all facilities are good and worth for the fees we pay. Additional activities are also conducted based on student interest.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Degree and Post Graduate College, NelloreReviewed on 20 Sep 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college compared to other colleges in this locality.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, but there is no one to teach you or give you hands-on experience. We don't have any hostel in college, but we have a canteen which is not bad. The prices in the canteen are not much high. But we need to buy all records and materials from the canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 2 Sep 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has high demand for rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Krishna Chaitanya Degree and Post Graduate College, NelloreReviewed on 24 Aug 2022)
reviews.review_heading: In Krishna Chaitanya degree & post graduate college is one of the good college in Nellore.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Most of students joined in this course. Because it is equal to software developer and engineer. Every week there was computer classes for coding languages like c+ Java .

highlights.summary:
SRK Institute of Technology admissions 2025-26 are now open! Students can visit the official website to learn more and apply.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: SRK Institute of Technology offers a large collection of courses for students looking for a career in Engineering and Technical fields. This includes the BTech course which is often in popular demand at the institute. The BTech program is offered in a wide variety of specializations at SRK Institute of Technology. Also sought-after is the valuable Integrated MBA (IMBA) course at the institute. Popular BTech specializations include Computer Science Engineering (CSE), Civil Engineering, Electronics and Communications Engineering, IT, etc.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

Students can visit the official website and learn more regarding the particulars of their course choice like fees details, eligibility criteria, specializations, etc. Interested candidates must have passed their Higher Secondary (HSC) with valid scoring and must have appeared for any of the allocated entrance-tests for their course, whether Engineering or Management.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for SRK Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    SRK Institute of Technology generally admits students based on entrance exam scores or via counselling. Hence, securing 75% in Class 12 may not be enough to secure a spot at the undergradaute courses offered at the institute. Students also need to provide valid exam scores or fulfil the selection criteria of the institute. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Information technology is good in all activities.

review_content.Placements: Students with coding languages are selected in some companies and some students got internships and some are opted for abroad for doing Masters. The highest package offered by the placements is 15 LPA and lower 3.5 LPA and average 6 LPA. Top companies offered are Wipro, Infosys, Walmart, Accenture, etc. Top roles offered are trainee, software developer, data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with many mango trees and very attractive, and peacefulness is included when we go there. Coming to the hostel, the food is good and the menu changes every day, separate menu for weekends. Sports and games are conducted every 3 months, the final sports will be conducted and many prizes are distributed on annual day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and qualified faculty.

review_content.Placements: Many of the students are placed in companies, and some got internships. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA offered by various companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, etc. Many companies from both IT and non-IT came for the recruitment of students. Top roles offered are Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Trainee, and Backend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with a good atmosphere, and Wi-Fi is available, but the signal will not come; mobile phone signals also do not come in college. The quality of the hostel is acceptable, but proper maintenance is not there. The food is good with a daily change of menu, and weekly there is non-veg. Medical facilities are provided inside the college only for hostelers. Sports and games are conducted every month.

faqs.answer: To get admission into the SRK Institute of Technology courses, students need to complete several steps. The first step is to go through the admission criteria of the desired programme. Eligible students can then proceed further by registering themselves on the admission portal of the accepted exam/ counselling or at the website itself (for direct admissions). Once a seat is offered, students need to go through document verification and pay the SRKIT Vijayawada admission fees as per the institute's guidelines.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in SRK Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: S.R.K. Institute Of Technology provides programmes including MCA, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does S.R.K. Institute Of Technology offer?

faqs.answer: Yes, you may get direct admission at SRK Institute of Technology. The institute reserves a certain amount of seats under the management quota. These seats are reserved under the “Category B”. 30% of the seats will be filled in by the college as per the norms approved by the Government of Andhra Pradesh. However, students may still have to fulfil the basic eligibility set by the college/concerned authority. For more details, students may connect with the help desk of the college.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at SRK Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: Yes, SRK Institute of Technology admissions are currently open for various courses. Students can visit the college's official website to obtain the latest admission-related information.
