review_summary.college_name: SRK Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and good faculty.

content.Placements: Placements are very limited and are based on knowledge and percentage, so the college selects students accordingly for placements. Many students do not go for placements. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average package offered last year is 6 LPA. Top companies are Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, TCS, and many other non-IT companies also came. Roles offered include software analyst, data entry, trainee engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, with peaceful greenery. Classrooms and outdoor areas are clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, with passwords provided. The library and labs are present with good equipment and updated systems. Canteen food is good and very hygienic. Medical facilities are provided for hostel students inside the campus. Sports and games are conducted every year with prize distribution.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Innovative information technology, and i miss my college days.

content.Placements: Most of the students are selected for internships. Some students got jobs in software development, and other roles are offered based on company requirements. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package offered by the companies is 6 LPA. Top companies are Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and some non-IT companies also came for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good and very clean. Classrooms are also very good, with good ventilation and fresh air, making them very pleasant. Wi-Fi is present on the campus, and passwords are pasted outside. The library is available with well-stocked books, and a digital library is also provided with updated systems that anyone can use. The hostel is acceptable, and the food is good with daily changes in the menu. Sports and games are conducted every month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Information technology is good in all activities.

content.Placements: Students with coding languages are selected in some companies and some students got internships and some are opted for abroad for doing Masters. The highest package offered by the placements is 15 LPA and lower 3.5 LPA and average 6 LPA. Top companies offered are Wipro, Infosys, Walmart, Accenture, etc. Top roles offered are trainee, software developer, data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with many mango trees and very attractive, and peacefulness is included when we go there. Coming to the hostel, the food is good and the menu changes every day, separate menu for weekends. Sports and games are conducted every 3 months, the final sports will be conducted and many prizes are distributed on annual day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and qualified faculty.

content.Placements: Many of the students are placed in companies, and some got internships. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA offered by various companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, etc. Many companies from both IT and non-IT came for the recruitment of students. Top roles offered are Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Trainee, and Backend.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with a good atmosphere, and Wi-Fi is available, but the signal will not come; mobile phone signals also do not come in college. The quality of the hostel is acceptable, but proper maintenance is not there. The food is good with a daily change of menu, and weekly there is non-veg. Medical facilities are provided inside the college only for hostelers. Sports and games are conducted every month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Computer Science and Engineering.

content.Placements: Placements are good, and almost 50 percent of the students are placed in the previous year. This year, the highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, TCS, and many others offering decent packages. Various roles are provided based on company requirements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and campus maintenance are good. However, Wi-Fi is not available around the campus, and mobile signal strength is also not very good. The library is well-equipped with a good collection of books. Hostel food is acceptable, with good taste and a weekly changing menu. Sports and games are conducted every year, and prizes are distributed on annual day.

admission_overview.college_name: SRK Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: SRK Institute Of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SRK Institute of Technology admissionis primarily entrance-based. The institute offers several courses at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels in full-time mode. These courses are offered in the fields of Engineering, Management, and Computer Applications. Students must qualify for the course of choice before proceeding further with the process. SRK Institute of Technology, also known asSRKIT Vijayawada, offers its courses in affiliation withJNTUK. The institute follows the admission norms of theAndhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education(APSCHE). Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information for the institute.

SRK Institute of Technology course admissionis made on the basis of preset admission criteria as specified by the college/ regulatory bodies. Students seeking to join the college need to meet the basic eligibility in addition to clearing the selection rounds/providing entrance exam scores.

Forundergraduate admissions, students need to complete Class 12, whereasPG admissionsrequire candidates to complete graduation in the relevant field. Check out the following table to learn all about the general eligibility and selection criteria forSRK Institute of Technology courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
Graduation from a recognised university
Graduation in a relevant field from a recognised university
GATE|AP PGCET
Graduation in a relevant field from a recognised university

Admission to SKRIT Vijayawadarequires candidates to go through a multi-step procedure. The process starts with checking the eligibility for the desired programme, followed by applying for the same. The entire process is usually carried out online. Students looking to get admission into any of the courses offered at the college can follow the steps explained below to completeSRK Institute of Technology admission process:
Step 1: Checking the Eligibility

Students can visit the institute’s official website to learn all about the admission procedure and eligibility of the preferred course. The process may vary depending on several factors. A general idea of theSRKIT Vijayawada admission criteriacan be obtained from the table above.
Step 2: Entrance Exam
The institute offers seats based on entrance exam scores, hence, students are advised to appear and clear the accepted test before applying. Some of the accepted exams include GATE, AP EAMCET, etc.
Step 3: Seat Allotment & Counselling Process
Step 4: Seat Confirmation
To secure a seat, students need to pay theSRK Institute of Technology feesas prescribed by the institute.

The institute also offers lateral admissions for the course. Find below key highlights forSRK Institute of Technology BTech admission:

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech at SRK Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: SRK Institute of Technology BTech selection criteriais primarily entrance-based. The college admits students based on their performance in the accepted exam and the past academic performance. Students need to appear for the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET exam to get selected for the course. The basic eligibility required to apply for the course is to complete Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board.

The course is offered in two specialisations, namelyElectronics and Communication Engineeringand Computer Science Engineering etc. Admission to the programme is completely based on the scores achieved by the students in their last qualifying or accepted exam. The institute accepts a valid score secured in exams, such as GATE and PGECET. Find below the key highlights for the SRKIT Vijayawada MTech admission:

faqs.question: Are M.Tech admissions at SRK Institute of Technology merit-based?
faqs.answer: No,SRK Institute of Technology M.Tech admissionsare generally not merit-based. Students need to complete graduation from a recognised university in a relevant field. Further, at the time admission, students must provide valid score obtained in GATE/ PGECET. Hence, no M.Tech admissions at SRKIT Vijayawada are not merit-based. For more information, students can visit the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in SRK Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: To get admission into the SRK Institute of Technology courses, students need to complete several steps. The first step is to go through the admission criteria of the desired programme. Eligible students can then proceed further by registering themselves on the admission portal of the accepted exam/ counselling or at the website itself (for direct admissions). Once a seat is offered, students need to go through document verification and pay theSRKIT Vijayawada admission feesas per the institute's guidelines.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at SRK Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, you may get direct admission at SRK Institute of Technology. The institute reserves a certain amount of seats under the management quota. These seats are reserved under the “Category B”.  30% of the seats will be filled in by the college as per the norms approved by the Government of Andhra Pradesh. However, students may still have to fulfil the basic eligibility set by the college/concerned authority. For more details, students may connect with the help desk of the college.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for SRK Institute of Technology admissions?
faqs.answer: SRK Institute of Technology admissions are done on the basis of a pre-decided admission criteria. Aspirants must qualify the same to get a seat at the college. Students need to fulfil both the basic eligibility and selection criteria. Check out the table below to learn about the generalSRKIT Vijayawada admission criteria:CourseEligibilitySelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 or equivalent from a recognised boardAP EAMCETMBAGraduation from a recognised universityAPICETMTechGraduation in a relevant field from a recognised universityGATE| Andhra Pradesh PGCETMCAGraduation in a relevant field from a recognised universityAPICET

faqs.question: Are admissions open at SRK Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes,SRK Institute of Technology admissionsare currently open for various courses. Students can visit the college's official website to obtain the latest admission-related information. Candidates are advised to go through the website or connect with the college's help desk to obtain all the relevant updates about the course of choice for better understanding.

For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 27898 to 97808, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with peaceful greenery. Classrooms and outdoor areas are clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, with passwords provided. The library and labs are present with good equipment and updated systems. Canteen food is good and very hygienic. Medical facilities are provided for hostel students inside the campus. Sports and games are conducted every year with prize distribution.

reviews.review_heading: Innovative information technology, and i miss my college days.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and very clean. Classrooms are also very good, with good ventilation and fresh air, making them very pleasant. Wi-Fi is present on the campus, and passwords are pasted outside. The library is available with well-stocked books, and a digital library is also provided with updated systems that anyone can use. The hostel is acceptable, and the food is good with daily changes in the menu. Sports and games are conducted every month.

Coming to the hostel, the food is good and the menu changes every day, separate menu for weekends. Sports and games are conducted every 3 months, the final sports will be conducted and many prizes are distributed on annual day.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good with a good atmosphere, and Wi-Fi is available, but the signal will not come; mobile phone signals also do not come in college. The quality of the hostel is acceptable, but proper maintenance is not there. The food is good with a daily change of menu, and weekly there is non-veg. Medical facilities are provided inside the college only for hostelers. Sports and games are conducted every month.

reviews.review_heading: Computer Science and Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and campus maintenance are good. However, Wi-Fi is not available around the campus, and mobile signal strength is also not very good. The library is well-equipped with a good collection of books. Hostel food is acceptable, with good taste and a weekly changing menu. Sports and games are conducted every year, and prizes are distributed on annual day.

reviews.review_heading: Innovative information technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available through the college, and the mobile signal is also very poor. Labs are maintained with updated versions, and every person has a separate system. Both a digital library and a normal library are available with many books. The quality of food in the hostel is acceptable, and medical facilities are not provided inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with a better atmosphere. Classrooms are also well-equipped, with separate chairs for every student. Labs are maintained with fully updated systems, and fast internet connections. Hostel food is good and hygienic. A changing menu every day and non-veg served once per week. Medical facilities are provided for hostel students. Sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and the best people in life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good with neat classrooms, updated systems in labs, and proper ventilation. The hostel food is hygienic with a daily changing menu and weekly non-veg once a week, and the rooms are acceptable. Medical facilities are available only for hostel students. Sports and games are conducted every year and selections are also made.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, and the Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Classrooms are good with ventilation and a fresh atmosphere. Both digital and normal libraries are available, and anyone can use them and create an account. Hostel food is good with a daily change of menu and good value for money. Sports and games are conducted every year, and prizes are distributed.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with a fresh atmosphere. The quality of facilities is good. The hostel food is acceptable with a variety of food and a daily change of menu. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Medical facilities are available only for hostelers. Sports and games are conducted every year with certificates and prizes.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a good future, join our college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have good infrastructure and basic facilities. We have proper Wi-Fi, drinking water, and the best library. Hostel food is good, and everyone should be equal. In every one-day non-vegetarian food, three days of egg should be provided. Unlimited food is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: SRK college is the best. It provides good placements 2025.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but the labs are not provided properly with updated systems. The labs are not having good ventilation, it should be developed. Open Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel rooms are good. Food is also acceptable with change of menu daily. Sports and games are conducted for every 3 months.

reviews.review_heading: Choose SRK Institute of Technology for the bright future.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with peaceful surroundings and also fresh atmosphere. Classrooms are very good with comfortable chair. Wi-Fi is available through the campus. The labs and library are also provided inside the college. There is a digital library. The quality of the facilities in hostel is an acceptable value for money, and food is also hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with knowledgeable faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good with many facilities. The atmosphere also felt good. The classrooms were very spacious, with projectors present, and open Wi-Fi was available throughout the college. In labs, every student had a separate system, and updated versions were provided. Two types of libraries were present. A digital library and a normal library. Anything could be taken and returned carefully after completion.

reviews.review_heading: Information Technology was the best choice.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good, and labs were provided with separate systems for everyone. The updated versions were present. Classrooms were big with fresh ventilation and were very comfortable with the atmosphere. Open Wi-Fi was available throughout the college. The canteen provided hygienic food with value for money. Sports and games were held once every year, and prizes were distributed.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed in our college. The average salary offered is not good which is 3 LPM to 4 LPM. Around 15% of students get internships. It is an efficient college for middle-class families.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It provides the best lab facilities and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Hostel has good rooms and serves healthy food. It provides joyful environment. Mess uses fresh vegetables and fruits for cooking. Medical facilities are available. It has good sports fields.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry ready. Students get accurate results. Semester exams are not easy. Around 75 students pass the exams. The pass percentage is 50%. .

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and average placement rate.

review_content.Placements: 1. About 40-50% Percent of students were placed in my course. 2. The highest package 20-30 Lacs per annum, the lowest 3-5 Lacs per annum. 3. Essar group, kec international limited etc. Are the top recruiting companies. 4. About 60% students got internship and companies are National buildings construction corporation limited (NBCC), Ultratech cement limited etc. 5. Site engineer, Estimator etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. We have access of library where all the books related to civil and other courses are available but students don't have access of Wi-Fi in college campus but in college hostel we have free Wi-Fi available. For practical works we have lab in which we have equipment related to civil engineering and overall I want to say that college infrastructure was very good. 2. Hostel infrastructure was very good which include free Wi-Fi, RO water, Canteen, Medical first Aid box was available in warden room. I will rate mess food 3.5 out of 5. We have free access of gym also in our campus.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is very good in terms of infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: I got an offer letter during the campus placements in 2022, now it is 2024 and still they have not given me a date of joining. So I think the college placements are 0 percent and no internships are provided by the college. In the last year, we have to put in a lot efforts to get a job just because of the poor placements of the college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities given by the college are very good and excellent. The infrastructure of the college is really good in all the manners. There is no Wi-Fi for the students, but we can use it in the labs, not in the campus or in classrooms. The hostel food is just okay, not very good. Games activities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best college, I personally recommended my college.

content.Placements: 10% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is offered for about INR 17 lacs, and the lowest package is offered for about INR 3 lacs. The top recruiting companies are Wipro and Microsoft. Approximately 80% of students received internships at Wipro and Microsoft.
content.Infrastructure: The best and most clean infrastructure is available for our course and department. Wi-Fi, labs, gyms, classrooms, libraries, playing grounds, etc. are available. The quality of my hostel is very good—neat and clean. The quality of food in my hostel is very good—fresh and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed in our college. The average salary offered is not good which is 3 LPM to 4 LPM. Around 15% of students get internships. It is an efficient college for middle-class families.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It provides the best lab facilities and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Hostel has good rooms and serves healthy food. It provides joyful environment. Mess uses fresh vegetables and fruits for cooking. Medical facilities are available. It has good sports fields.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry ready. Students get accurate results. Semester exams are not easy. Around 75 students pass the exams. The pass percentage is 50%. .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and average placement rate.

content.Placements: 1. About 40-50% Percent of students were placed in my course. 2. The highest package 20-30 Lacs per annum, the lowest 3-5 Lacs per annum. 3. Essar group, kec international limited etc. Are the top recruiting companies. 4. About 60% students got internship and companies are National buildings construction corporation limited (NBCC), Ultratech cement limited etc. 5. Site engineer, Estimator etc.
content.Infrastructure: 1. We have access of library where all the books related to civil and other courses are available but students don't have access of Wi-Fi in college campus but in college hostel we have free Wi-Fi available. For practical works we have lab in which we have equipment related to civil engineering and overall I want to say that college infrastructure was very good. 2. Hostel infrastructure was very good which include free Wi-Fi, RO water, Canteen, Medical first Aid box was available in warden room. I will rate mess food 3.5 out of 5. We have free access of gym also in our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with my college, as they provide quality education.

content.Placements: 80% students got placed. The lowest package was 250000 and the highest package was 500000. The top recruiting companies were B. H. E. L, BEL, and HEAVELS. Almost 80-90% students got internship.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good. They provides Wi-Fi, labs, and smart classes. The quality of hostel food was too good. There was also a big ground available in the hostel.
content.Faculty: The teachers were highly qualified and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was awesome. This course made the students industry ready. Exams were not that much difficult. It would become easy, when you study daily.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, exciting scholarship schemes, incredible placement record.
reviews.review_text: State-of-the-art infrastructure, well-equipped labs and classrooms, and the most recent and up-to-date systems and software. Air-conditioned laboratories, seminar halls, classrooms, canteens, and cafeteria. This is a lively and exciting campus. A pleasure to be on such a wonderful campus.

reviews.review_heading: Shri ram group of colleges is the most successful college in last 5 years because src does it well.
reviews.review_text: In my college a huge library containing 2000 books and 5ghz Wi-Fi support to search anything within a sec. In my college 6 labs and 5 workshop lab and sports facilities are awesome and hostel management is quite good and the food in the hostel mess is perfect to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Everything is better in our college, and the environment and the infrastructure of the college are very good. Classrooms and labs are very good, and our civil engineering labs are good. The canteen is not that good, and the food is also average. Every facility is available in the college, like games and sports and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and faculty members are not good here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very well designed and lush green. I love the atmosphere here, but the quality of food served in the mess is not very good for students. There are various canteens here, but medical facilities are also not good here. So I would rate the infrastructure with 4 stars out of 5 stars.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average only for degree, not to gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: No one stays in the hostel here, and it remains empty. The campus canteen is not ready or fresh. The classrooms and library are well maintained. The campus has a great look and remains clean, but the canteen is the issue here.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, but it can be improved more.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are awesome and well-maintained. The library, chemistry lab and computer labs are awesome, with great staff members. They are well-maintained by separate staff members. Wi-Fi facilities are only available for staff members but not for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the city. I am satisfied with the faculty, good placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many facilities in all the subjects. The college provides a huge computer lab, classrooms, a library and a huge workshop. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facilities are also good, and food is served in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best. It is at 10th position in UP among all colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best for all type students. In our college, we have all the facilities in comparison to other colleges. All the departments are separate blocks here. There are also Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. The quality of the hostel is good and also the food served. There are medical facilities, canteen, sport and games in hostels and college campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college have good infrastructure and faculties they will be helping students any time.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available in my college like as wi-fi labs, computer labs, classroom and library etc. The quality of hostel and canteen is better than other colleges. And they are also provided the medical facilities free of cost. They do play session every Saturday.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but needs some improvements.

There are 24 hours of water and electricity facility. The quality of the food served in the mess is good. The cleaning facility is also good.

admission_overview.title: DIT University - Admission Office Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DIT University - Admission Office admission is a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course selected by the student. The university offers a wide range of courses across several fields, such as Engineering, Science, Pharmacy, Design, Arts, Management, and more. These courses are provided at the undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and diploma levels. Students fulfilling the admission criteria can apply online. The application process for the university commences online. DIT University - Admission Office accepts several national-level entrance exam scores for admission to some of its courses. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the admission process, criteria, and other admission-relevant information for the university. Download DIT University - Admission Office Brochure

eligibility_selection.title: DIT University - Admission Office Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: DIT University - Admission Office course admission is subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students wishing to get into any of the courses offered at the institute are required to satisfy both the minimum educational qualifications along with the selection rounds. The university shortlists candidates on a merit basis for several programmes, such as BPT, BMLT, etc. Additionally, for courses, such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., candidates need to appear for the accepted entrance exam followed by any further rounds of selection as prescribed by the university.

faqs.answer: DIT University - Admission Office's selection criteria are both merit and entrance-based. The university admits candidates either on the basis of the merit secured in the last qualifying examination. The university accepts several national-level entrance examinations, such as GATE, UGC NET, MAT, CAT, etc. Students with valid UKSEE scores may also apply for selective courses. Further, the final selection is done based on counselling conducted by the university. For merit-based admissions, candidate's marks in the last qualifying exam are considered.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria of the DIT University - Admission Office?

faqs.answer: DIT University - Admission Office eligibility criteria require candidates to complete the last qualifying exam from a recognised board/ university/institution. For those wishing to join the university's undergraduate courses, candidates need to have passed Class 12 from a recognised board. Similarly, for postgraduate admissions, students need to complete graduation from a recognised. For more information, students can connect with the admission desk of DIT University - Admission Office.

admission_process.title: DIT University - Admission Office Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: DIT University - Admission Office's admission procedureinvolves several steps, starting from application, followed by selection, and admission confirmation. Check below the admission steps forDIT University Admission Office Dehradun:
Online Application
The mode of application is online for all courses. students need to pay an application fee to apply for admission.
Selection Rounds

The university shortlists students based on their merit or entrance exam scores. DIT University Dehradun also conducts DUET for shortlisting aspirants for MPharm, M.Tech and PhD courses. The university conducts other selection rounds, like GDPI or PI rounds for some of the specific courses. However, for PhD who have a valid score GATE / SET / SLET will be selected based on PI.
Counselling & Admission Confirmation
After the completion of the selection rounds, students are called for merit-based counselling and document verification. Selected students need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: DIT University - Admission Office Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel accommodation comprises of American style apartments which are well furnished, hygienic and have ultramodern amenities. Each apartment has three rooms shared by two students each, a lobby and attached bathrooms. The hostel premises has common TV room, tuck-shops (having stationary, barber, bakery, juice etc. shops) and state of the art indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The entire hostel premises are Wi-Fi enabled and has a separate computer centre with 24X7 internet facility. There are four in-campus boys' hostel viz. Raman, Bose, Bhabha and Sarabhai with a total capacity of accommodating around 1,200 boys. University also has a separate in-campus Girls’ Hostels viz. Sarojini Girls’ Hostel which can accommodate around 900 girl students. Students can also watch their favourite TV Channels on numerous TVs with DTH connections which are available in all the hostels. All hostel blocks are equipped with solar water heaters with heating elements which provide warm water in the hostels all year round.

library.description: Centrally air-conditioned library equipped with all Indian and foreign author books and over 1 Lakh books, over 3500 CDs/DVDs, subscribes to more than 202 journals/magazines in print and subscribes to more than 5000 e-journals

The hostel premises also has tuck-shops (having bakery, juice etc shops). The food served is of high quality and meets the acceptable quality standards of as laid down under FSSAI and other Govt food safety regulations.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: TC Business School is a very good college for BCA.

content.Placements: TC Business School in Jaipur receives mixed reviews regarding its placement services. The college provides placement facilities to all students. Recruiting companies include Bajaj, Tata, and Paytm, offering average packages between 3 LPA and 4 LPA and a maximum of 22 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The current rate for the hostel is Rs.6,000 per month. The hostel is very luxurious, and the food is very good quality.
content.Faculty: BCA faculty members are highly qualified with advanced degrees in computer science, information technology, or related fields. Many have industry experience, bringing practical insights into the classroom. Most BCA faculty members have a strong background in computer science or IT. The BCA course at the college offers an understanding of computer science, programming, and application development.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for students.

content.Placements: Placements are not good. Our seniors were not happy with the placements. The highest salary package is 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package is 1.5 LPA. 60% of students got internships. It is a good college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, desks, and computers for coding. The library is good. The canteen is good. The quality of the food is remarkable. Our college provides games facilities.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are humble. They always help you with your studies and other stuff. The curriculum is always accurate and that's why we do not have any problem in exams. They always visit to the industry to know the environment and many such things.

admission_overview.college_name: TC Business School Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: TC Business School Admission process 2025

paragraphs: TC Business School admission 2025is open for all courses. The school offers UG and PG courses in the stream ofManagementandComputer Applications. Admission to all the courses at TCBS is both entrance-based and merit-based.Students are shortlisted either based on national/ state entrance exams such asCAT, MAT, XAT, etcor merit secured in the qualifying exam. For the PGDCA courses, candidates are selected based on a direct or merit-based. Interested candidates can visit the official website ofTCBSand fill out an online application form.

TC Business School admission 2025is entrance-based except for PGDCA. Candidates have to sit and appear for the entrance exam and PI as per respective courses. Check out the following table for details aroundTC Business School course admissions2025:
Particulars
TC Business School Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Online at https://tcbsjaipur.com
Level of programmes offered
Download Now
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Candidates seeking admission to TC Business School courses must begin their admission process by meeting the course-specific eligibility criteria and then go through the predetermined selection process. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forTC Business School courses:
Graduate with 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category candidates)
Class 12 in any stream with 48% aggregate
Class 12 in any stream with 48% aggregate
Graduate or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Graduate or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate

TC Business School's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the TC Business School:
STEP 1: TC Business School Application Process 2025

Aspirants can apply for MBA, BBA, BCA and MCA courses at the official website of the institute, i.e., https://tcbsjaipur.com. The application fee for various courses is INR 1,000. Students can also check the detailedTC Business School feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at TEC Business School are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college. Students are selected based on the entrance exam and PI for BBA, BCA, and MCA courses. However, MBA course, candidates will be selected based on CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ + Interview.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

reviews.review_heading: TC Business School is a very good college for BCA.
reviews.review_text: The current rate for the hostel is Rs.6,000 per month. The hostel is very luxurious, and the food is very good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, desks, and computers for coding. The library is good. The canteen is good. The quality of the food is remarkable. Our college provides games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for BBA in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All facilities are available such as a playground, canteen, library, computer laboratory, art club, and fine club. Auditorium is available on our campus. Hostel facilities are good. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: TC Business School review.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent and it is equipped with all the amenities. There are parking spaces for vehicles, grass garden, library, canteen, etc. Wi-Fi facility is also available in this college. The college is located in pratap Nagar Jaipur. All the transport facilities are present at this location.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for better placement after graduation.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel provided by the college. But from this year on, the college will start the hostel facility, so I can't give any suggestions about it. But the classroom infrastructure is very good. It looks very luxurious from inside. And they also provide you with a smart board.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. A huge lab is available in our college. Classrooms are spacious. Around 150 students can accommodate in each classroom. There is a library. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for better education and training.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the campus is neat and clean. There is a well-managed library where all students do their work quietly and efficiently. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Our labs are updated. Facilities of the hostel are quite good and well-managed. The quality of the food is quite decent. The chef maintains proper hygiene and food quality standards. Medical facilities are available. Emergency medical kits are up-to-date.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for education purposes, where students learn many different things.
reviews.review_text: There is a neat and clean environment on our campus. There is a well-decorated library where all students do their work. There is a Wi-Fi lab. All the systems in labs are fully functional. There are NIT classes in our classrooms, and there is a digital board for digital training. Facilities of the hostel are quite good and comfortable for someone who would like to live there. The quality of the food is delicious as they keep proper maintenance in hygiene and quality of food. The canteen is quite...

reviews.review_heading: My experience in college is outstanding.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure I've ever seen and experienced. All the basic facilities for the students were provided by college management. Also the other advanced facilities like classrooms with smart boards, electricity, internet availability. College environment and surroundings were maintained everyday. Pleasant atmosphere for mental health and concentration.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is top-notch. Wi-Fi facility is available for students throughout the college building. Classrooms and all the labs like computer labs are well-equipped and are of top quality. The electricity supply is good, and hostel rooms are also very good. Various sports and games are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a wonderful college with good placements and awesome faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has a wonderful infrastructure with all-time Wi-Fi and water supply facilities. The interior is superb. The power supply is available all the time. Hostels are well furnished and clean. Students participate in many games like football, volleyball, cricket etc. They also participate in music and many other activities.

reviews.review_heading: BCA is the best course in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our college provide a conducive environment for effective learning and overall development of its students. The college has well-equipped classrooms and labs. The campus is under CCTV surveillance. Facilities like an auditorium, Wi-Fi, hostels for students, sports, library, transportation, etc., are available.

faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission to the MBA programme at Quantum School of Business, Quantum University, is a graduate degree of a minimum three-year duration from any stream with a minimum of 50% marks. The admission to the MBA programme is based on valid scores in the University-accepted entrance exams like CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT or merit scores in Class 12. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission.

content.Placements: Quantum University is one of the best universities in Dehradun for MBA courses. Around 40%–50% of students got placed. The college offers salary packages between 7 LPA and 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are IBM, Techno India, Capgemini, Deloitte, and Infosys. Top roles offered are HR, consultant, recruiter, and advisor.
content.Infrastructure: Quantum University has really good facilities for students. The university has a big campus and a lively environment. The college has Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, computer labs, a library, and a canteen. Sports and hostel facilities are also available.

college_info.college_name: Quantum School of Business (Admission Office) Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Quantum School of Business, Quantum University offers scholarships based on Q-Care Exam scores, Class 12 board exam scores, and entrance exam scores such as CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT. For instance, students who score 80% and above in Class 12 board exams or Q-Care Exam are eligible for a 100% scholarship on tuition fees in the first year. Additionally, students with a valid score in CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT are given preference for MBA admission. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission, which forms the basis of eligibility for some courses and for scholarships for most of the programs.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Sai Vidya Institute of Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30976 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 22623, while in 2023, it was 24779.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Sai Vidya Institute of Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 57230 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 50160, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Sai Vidya Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering stood at 33986 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 93094. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college, faculty, and teaching with good placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The academic curriculum at Sai Vidya Institute of Technology is well-structured with supportive faculty who make learning engaging. Hostel provides a safe and comfortable environment with good food and facilities. A few improvements in internet speed and extracurricular activities would further enhance the overall experience.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is a bit smaller compared to some other institutions.
reviews.review_text: The library facilities are very good and provide students with all the required resources for learning. The hostel facilities are average and could be improved. However, the sports facilities are excellent, encouraging students to stay active and participate in various games.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent teaching and good campus.
reviews.review_text: This college provides a great infrastructure and good facilities available for courses and departments. They give us free Wi-Fi, and labs are equipped with AC, and they also provide the latest version of systems. All the classrooms are equipped with smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: There is good placement training.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers well-maintained infrastructure, including Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a vast library with digital access. The hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms and a 24/7 water supply. The mess food is decent, with a variety of options, though it could improve in taste. Medical services are available on campus, and sports facilities like basketball courts, a gym, and indoor games are well-maintained. Overall, the infrastructure supports both academic and person...

reviews.review_heading: Here there is good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities, I have been in this college for 3 years, and there are very good facilities, so I recommend it for students to join the college for a good career and focus on a better future in MNV and placement. Finally, the infrastructure is good, with a hostel and a library.

reviews.review_heading: It has a balanced campus life, good infrastructure, active clubs, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The department offers smart classrooms, good lab facilities, reliable Wi-Fi, and access to library resources. Hostel and mess services are decent and regularly maintained. A psychologist and a medical advisor have been appointed for the well-being of students and faculty members. A good number of sports events are held annually.

reviews.review_heading: Good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they provide the facility of a hostel and we have labs, classrooms, and library. The college has a good environment, and we have medical facilities. They provide students to perform in the cultural activities, and they encourage us to participate in the sports, and they take us on industrial visits like RBI visit, MSME conclaves, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Work hard until you reach your goal.
reviews.review_text: We have good canteen facilities. We can have lots of fun, and our college has medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A student's perspective: Review of campus life.
reviews.review_text: Sai Vidya Institute of Technology (SVIT) Bangalore offers various infrastructure and facilities for its students including separate hostels for boys and girls well equipped labs a spacious library and sports facilities. The campus also includes a cafeteria and shuttle service.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching wise the college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is cool and peaceful. Classrooms are well organized with a projector facility. Cleanliness is maintained. Laboratories are well-equipped. The college has a vast library with so many books, journals, novels, etc. We have a Wi-Fi campus. Canteen food is also good and quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, modern infrastructure, and expert faculty members.
reviews.review_text: College has a very good infrastructure with projectors in the classrooms. Library has a great collection of books required for academics. Lab has a good set of computers available for students to learn and practice with required network and Wi-Fi connections. Canteen is within the premises with different food options at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I would suggest this college. Overall, a decent college for serious study and enjoying college life.
reviews.review_text: The institution has good facilities such as labs, a library, large and well-kept classrooms, a playground with sports equipment for student activities, and canteens that serve a variety of wholesome meals. In the library, there are pertinent books, research papers, and digital resources available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. There are lots of labs for the respective courses, starting from DSP labs to communication labs. Everything is well-equipped with technical requirements. The hostel is good and comfortable, with nothing negative about hostels. For non-vegetarians, it would be difficult.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good management who understand us.
reviews.review_text: We have decent infrastructure. We have good classrooms and labs. Everything is present but not good. Our auditorium could be more large. Else all other required stuff is present. The hostel is also good, decent food and also a canteen where you get many kinds of food. Management is cooperative and listens to all the concerns, and facts according.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus is well-structured with libraries, labs, a canteen, hostels, etc. Here, we have a peaceful campus, and in the library, the books are well-organized and we can get books related to our subject. The labs are pretty good, and sports are also better here.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi University College of Commerce and Business Management.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. 20,000 is the course fee. If you get a seat through the entrance of CPGET, it is free. Pharma, clinical and laboratories offer placements. 80% of students got internships. The roles offered are lab technician, teaching, research, clinical investigator etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the labs are well-equipped. The campus environment is friendly. Wi-Fi is available. The library is good. Books are abundant. Medical facilities are available, along with an ambulance. Sports and games facilities are available. The food quality is good. Hostel facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Nov 25) - M.Sc. in Organic Chemistry - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with facilities and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no laboratory facility in our college. The food served in the hostel was not good.
review_content.Faculty: Semester exams were difficult, and the pass percentage was less. Faculty members were not good in our college. Exam paper corrections were not good. Every year, around 20% of students pass examinations.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA Integrated - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college & I'm completely satisfied with it.

review_content.Placements: Almost 7% of the students get placed in college. The highest salary package offered was 9 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.2 LPA. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Tata, Bajaj, and HDFC are the top recruiting companies of our college. Almost 5% of the students get internships. Roles offered are as financial advisory, and all courses related to marketing are offered. Most of the students who feel mathematics is hard will generally opt this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, but the labs were provided. Classrooms & a library are available. Overall, the infrastructure is very good. The quality of food served is above average. When we compare with the fees we are paying, it feels far better than any other college regarding food.

highlights.summary:
The MAT 2026 exam result for admission to the MBA course for the CBT and the PBT modes will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Dnyansagar Institute of Management & Technology (DIMR) offers PG and doctorate-level programmes in the field of Computer Applications and Management. At the PG level, the institute offers a full-time two-year MBA programme and a full-time MCA programme.
MBA is the most opted programme at Dnyansagar Institute of Management & Technology (DIMR). Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme at the institute must possess a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories) and should have valid scores in MH-CET/ CMAT/ MAT/ CAT based on which they will be shortlisted for further admission process. Below are the details regarding the popular programmes at the Dnyansagar Institute of Management & Technology (DIMR):

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for any and every course offered by DIMR. Check below the DIMR courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:CourseEligibilitySelectionMBABachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregateCAT/ MAT/ MHCETMBA PrimeBachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregateCAT/ MAT/ MHCETMCABachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregateCAT/ MAT/ MHCET
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for various courses offered at DIMR Pune?

review_content.General: The college has no Wi-Fi, but labs are well-equipped. Computers are a little bit difficult to handle (due to Linux Operating System), and classrooms are also good. The library is having more course books rather than literature and reference books. The college has good football, cricket ground and badminton court. There is a bit problem of canteen facility as convenient food is not there. No hostel rooms are available. As the construction work always going on there, you have to worry about parking your bike. As this college is situated in a rural area, you must have own vehicle. Bus service is not available frequently.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (Prime) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college performance.

review_content.Placements: The placements of our college are good, and our college always tries to provide opportunities to every student. Our college organises job fair every year that also help the student to get job opportunities. The average college salary offered was approximately 5 lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had a learning environment. The classrooms are good with the latest equipment like a projector. The library is also well-developed with lots of the latest books and also had medical facilities. The college has its playground, but we had to take permission before using it and our college has a neat and clean canteen which serve good quality of food.

reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: I felt during my study that teachers and management never makes students run out of their duties. I have been taken care personally, in such a way that my scoring in University was always beyond expectation. Time management and involvement in regular functions has created professional outcome in my life.

review_summary.college_name: Dnyansagar Institute of Management and Research, Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (Prime) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I'm extremely satisfied with faculty members, placement and the campus infrastructure.

content.Placements: 80% of the students were placed of my course with a the highest package of 5 lacs and the lowest package of 2.5 lacs in reputed organisations. The top recruiting companies were Westeria Properties, Bajaj Finserv etc. 100% of students got internship in company of their domain. The top role offered was of an Executive.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available are Wi-Fi, Projector, Lab, library and classroom which are extremely spacious and hold a capacity of 60 - 80 students in a class. The campus has a canteen with a very good, hygienic and quality food. They have a sport ground and tennis ring well-equipped with sports instruments.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (Prime) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied due to lack of faculty coordination.

content.Placements: Placements in association with Shine, Monster, TOI were available. Around 40% of my batch students were placed. The salary range was between Rs. 21000 (the highest) per month, Rs. 15000 (average) per month and Rs. 10000 (the lowest) per month. Many renowned companies were there like fFrstcry, Justdial, Royal Enfield, WNS and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The college has no Wi-Fi, but labs are well-equipped. Computers are a little bit difficult to handle (due to Linux Operating System), and classrooms are also good. The library is having more course books rather than literature and reference books. The college has good football, cricket ground and badminton court. There is a bit problem of canteen facility as convenient food is not there. No hostel rooms are available. As the construction work always going on there, you have to worry about parking your bike. As this college is situated in a rural area, you must have own vehicle. Bus service is not available frequently.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (Prime) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college performance.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are good, and our college always tries to provide opportunities to every student. Our college organises job fair every year that also help the student to get job opportunities. The average college salary offered was approximately 5 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a learning environment. The classrooms are good with the latest equipment like a projector. The library is also well-developed with lots of the latest books and also had medical facilities. The college has its playground, but we had to take permission before using it and our college has a neat and clean canteen which serve good quality of food.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (Prime) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Don't Take Admission in this College.

content.Placements: Out of 47 Students only 3 are placed from the college campus. Rest all are doing the job found by their own. With maximum salary of 20k. The college will promise you to give placement of minimum 4 to 5 LPA. But they won't be able to give placement for even 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I loved the Hostel. But the hostel deposit was never refunded by the College. And always used to ditch us whenever we ask about the refund. Talk about the infrastructure. The college will say that it is AC classrooms. But there are barely enough fans in the classrooms. The college is so small that you will not feel like coming here.

college_info.college_name: Dnyansagar Institute of Management and Research, Pune Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, DIMR Pune offers the following scholarships:
Scholarships for Girls:All girls who meet the eligibility requirement for admission of the programme and have an offer to join DIMR are eligible for a 10% scholarship.

Special Scholarship:To encourage students from the states of Jammu & Kashmir and North East (Assam, Arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Tripura and Nagaland) to study at DIMR, DIMR offers a special scholarship of 25% to all students from Jammu & Kashmir and North East, who meet the eligibility requirement of the programme and have an offer to join DIMR.DIMR also give additional scholarships of 10% to girls from these states. The scholarships will be subject to government approved certificates for proof of residence like voters id/passport/domicile state certificate.

Outstanding Achievements Scholarship:This Scholarship has been instituted to acknowledge outstanding contribution of students in the area of Sport, culture, Bravery and other co-curricular activities. If the achievement has been recognized/ awarded at National/ International level by a third party, the students can apply to avail the above scholarship. These students would be eligible for 15% scholarship only. Scholarship will be awarded on an annual basis and can be renewed each academic year subject to academic progress and general conduct.

review_summary.college_name: Angadi Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Well-rounded experience with good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements.

content.Placements: I completed my B.E. In computer science from Angadi Institute of Technology and Management, Belagavi, in the 2023 batch. Various technical events, workshops, and placement training sessions were organized to enhance students' skills and employability. Around 75%-80% of students from our batch were placed. The highest package offered was around 10 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average package was approximately 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Accenture, and Tech Mahindra. About 60% of students received internships.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our beautiful college, AITM.

content.Placements: In our college last year, some people were placed in companies, and most people in training companies, so there is a 3-star rating. The average package is 3 to 4 LPA. Companies like TCS and Accenture are mainly coming. Internships are given in our college and on the other side also.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good, the campus is nice, and labs and classes are well-equipped with projectors and all. When it comes to the hostel, you'll find that the rooms are comfortable and cleaner than others I've seen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has good campus and good faculty.

content.Placements: Every year, 85 students get placed in our course. The average salary package offered ranges from 3.5 LP - 4 LPA. 80% of students got internships in companies like Wipro, TCS, and other good companies. More than 85% of students are getting placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is good in our college. Labs are okay but, some PCs are not working. Classrooms are good, eco-friendly and they maintain cleanness. Library is good with all types of books available and all the books are useful for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has top-notch faculty and average facilities. We get a mixed bag experience.

content.Placements: About 90% of students get placed in Angadi College. The highest package ranges from 7-8 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, TCS, CGI, HP, etc. About 90-100% of students get internships. Top roles offered are software developer, technical support engineer, HR, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with projectors and digital teaching aids. Each department has well-equipped labs. Computer Science and electronics branches have modern labs with updated systems, licensed software, and sufficient hardware kits.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college, and all the students come and admission here only.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed in our college. The highest package offered ranges from 5 LPA to 9 LPA. 100% of students got internships from our college. Rules and discipline are maintained. Companies like Google, and Infosys visit the campus. Good companies come to our college. Nobody should hate the college. It is a very good college.
content.Infrastructure: We get good food in the hostel. All classrooms are cleaned by workers every day. It has a good environment when compared to other colleges. We can see only buildings in our college. The campus has good oxygen. Labs are very good and clean. In library, we have good space to sit and all books are available in the library.

review_summary.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Placements for ECR are quite good here, with many seniors getting placed in companies like TCS, Wipro, and other core electronic firms. Above 60 percent of the students get placed every year in our college, with the highest package of 5 LPA and the average package of 4 LPA. We are also getting opportunities for internships from the third year.
content.Infrastructure: In our EC department, the labs are well-equipped with a lot of things like analog circuits, microprocessors, etc. The library has a good collection of books, there are thousands of books in our library. The hostel is good, but the food is bad. Wi-Fi is also available in our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent AI & ML branch and curriculum with great labs.

content.Placements: For our AI & ML branch, approximately 60 percent of the students are placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies included TCS and Wipro. Many of us secured internships in various AI & ML–related roles like data analyst and junior ML engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the AI & ML department is good. We had the latest labs which are essential for our projects. The library is well stocked with books and the latest journals on Data Science. Regarding the hostel, the rooms are big, and we had gym and sports facilities, but the food is bad in taste.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great learning environment for arrow with decent infrastructure and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: In our nautical branch, approximately 70 to 75 percent of the students got placed. The highest package offered is around 5 LPA, while the lowest is 2 LPA, with an average of 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies, including TAIN, various aerospace start-up companies, offer about 60 percent of the students internships at DRDO and HAL. Common roles offered include design engineering, including design engineering, graduate engineering, and maintenance engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The aeronautical department has well-equipped labs, such as aerodynamic and other labs. The library is consulted with relevant technical journals and textbooks. The campus has defined Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel, and the rooms are spacious. Well-maintained mess is available. Food is not as good as you expect compared to the private hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with lot of opportunities.

content.Placements: Most of the students are very well placed in greater companies. The highest package is 20 LPA and the average is around 3 LPA. The recruiting companies are Google, Zepto, etc. The course is about optoelectronic devices, communication and systems, electrical devices, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and we have a good library. The campus and hostel contain Wi-Fi and LAN connection. We can stay in hostel or we can go as a day scholar. The sports and medical facilities are available very well. The canteen is also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Do not expect placements and well faculty.

content.Placements: 20 to 25 percent of our Diploma students were placed as it does not offer more packages. When it comes to placements the college still needs to work harder. Only a limited number of companies visit and the opportunities were not very high for all branches. Students who are talented or take extra effort do get placed but overall placement statistics were average. Placements were somewhat limited. Overall the placement support still needs improvement.
content.Infrastructure: Overall an average college with a mix of positives and negatives. The campus environment was definitely one of its strengths its calm and green and gives students a comfortable place to study and enjoy college life. Placements were somewhat limited and only a few companies visit regularly. Students who put in extra effort can get placed but overall the placement support still needs improvement.

admission_process.title: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology admission process 2025isentrance-basedfor UG & PG courses.Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology, Hyderabad, affiliated with theJNTUH,offers various programmes at UG, PG and diploma level.
There are several courses options available, such asMTech, MBA, BTech, diplomain the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies atMIST. Admission to BTech is done on the basis ofEAMCETexam.

Before applying to MIST, candidates must satisfy the local/non-local status laid down by the Andhra Pradesh State Educational Institutions. the institute select the students on the basis of entrance exam score for all the courses admission.
Below mentioned are the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology eligibility and selection criteria details for the PG and diploma courses:
Know more aboutMahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology courses

Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology registration for all the courses admission must be doneonlineand the application process usually starts inFebruary,each year. Eligible candidates can apply by visiting the official website of MIST.
Below mentioned is the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology admission process:
Step 1:MISTApplication
Candidates need to apply on the official website of Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology @mist.ac.in
Step 2: MIST Selection round
Step 3: Seat Allotment

For BTech course, the provisional first phase allotment of seats will be prepared and will be published on the websitetseamcet.nic.in.To download the candidate’s Provisional Allotment Order, enter theROC Form Number, TSEAMCET Hall Ticket No., password and DOB in candidate login in on the TSEAMCET website.
Step 4: Payment of the Tuition Fees
Candidates need to pay the tuition fee through online (credit card / debit card/ net banking ) before the deadline set by MIST.
Step 5: Reporting/ Document Varification
Candidate has to report at the allotted college (MIST) after final phase of counselling and submit the copies of the certificates and original TC.

cut_off.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 24936 and 70972 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 24936, 26453 and 39430, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 19265. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 19878, and the 2023 cutoff was 12157 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

There are a lot of books in our library. All types of books are available, and the hostel is too bad. The food is bad in taste, and the quality of the food is poor.
