All types of books are available. The hostel is average, and the food is bad in taste. Poor quality of food is provided in the college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for studying and has a good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available in my course classrooms, labs, and library. Wi-Fi is provided separately for the hostel and the college. For hostels, separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of the food, canteen, medical, sports, and games is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college in our surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also wonderful, full of green plants, and the classrooms are also fully digital with projectors and spacious. There are a lot of books in the library, and all types of books are available. The hostel is average, and the food is bad in taste. Poor quality of food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Don’t expect to achieve high placements. If you want to attend this college, keep that in mind.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, and digital apps, along with good computers. The laboratories are also well-equipped. The library contains over one lakh books. However, the quality of facilities in the hostel is poor. The food in the mess is subpar, but the canteen offers better options. There are many sports and games available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: They need to improve the food quality and improve placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi, are not so good. Labs are also not good, and classrooms are somewhat better. Facilities in our hostel are lacking, and the quality of food is not so good. The mess needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure should be built and hostel food should improve.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are like Wi-Fi which is not properly working, the labs are good, and the classrooms are better to sit and study. The quality of facilities in our hostel is not good food is not considered good in the dinner time.

reviews.review_heading: College has a good infrastructure and experienced faculty, we cab choose this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi and labs are also good, with working systems. Classrooms are big in size, with air-conditioning and projectors. College also provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls, with Wi-Fi, gym equipment, clean and neat washrooms, and good food with full of quantity.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: All types of infrastructures are available. We have good practical labs. The machinery lab is awesome. All machines work well and give good results in practical. It is one of the best colleges for students who want to join engineering. We have a dream to become an engineer.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placements, but good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
College maintenance and infrastructure are not good. Hostel rooms were not clean and common bathrooms are for 50-60 people, which makes it uncomfortable. There are no proper washing areas for clothes or washing machines. 
College premises and washrooms were also not good.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college because infrastructure, teachers and other facilities are very good.

review_content.Placements: Very few students from our college got placed. The highest salary package offered is 7.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.4 LPA. Various companies like TCS, Property Pistol, Persistent, Collabera, Global Logic, L&T, etc., visit our college for placements. Students rarely get internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and our college provides various facilities for students. Wi-Fi facility is provided to students, and there are labs, library and classrooms here. Our college does not provide hostel and mess facility for students. However, the canteen is good on the campus, and various sports and games are also conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied with the college. Infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed. The salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Many multinational companies visited our college for placements. Students are offered with the role of mentoring. In our course, the salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. In our college, students did their internship from various companies, and I also did my internship from Dinshaw's Dairy Food Private Limited, Nagpur.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, all facilities like classrooms, library, conference hall, sport's room, canteen, gymnasium, medical room, etc., are very good. Every facility is provided for every student, and they take advantage of every facility of our college. Food served in the canteen is fresh and good.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR) is a well-known institute in the field of management education. It is recognised for its quality of education, experienced faculty, and strong placement support. The institute has established a reputation in the region, attracting students from various backgrounds seeking to pursue MBA/PGDM programs. overview_faqs.question: Is Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR) good?
overview_faqs.answer: Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR), Nagpur, is generally considered a good institute for management studies. Established in 1994, it is affiliated with Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University and is AICTE-approved. It offers MBA and BBA programs with a focus on practical and corporate-oriented learning. The college is NAAC accredited and provides facilities like a library, gym, and sports infrastructure. The institute's placement record is moderate, with companies visiting for recruitment across various sectors. It is a suitable option for students seeking affordable management education in Nagpur.

overview_faqs.question: Why is Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR) so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR) is famous for its strong academic programs and holistic development approach. Established in 1994, it offers a well-equipped campus with modern facilities, including a library and sports amenities. The institute's affiliation with Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University and its NAAC accreditation enhance its credibility. PLTIMSR also focuses on entrepreneurship and maintains strong industry connections, contributing to its esteemed reputation in management education.

review_summary.college_name: Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Faculty and Campus life are the best.

content.Placements: Less placements, only 30% of the batch is placed, with salaries ranging from 20,000 to 30,000/month. Mostly banks, finance, and marketing companies come for hiring. Shriram Finance hires the most, with 7 students as management trainees at 2.96 LPA. We all get internships, but only a few secure good and stipend-based internships. Roles offered include management trainee and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: College campus is spacious, free internet is available in both campus and hostel. The library is large and well-equipped with all kinds of books. Hostel fee is 80k/year with spacious rooms. Meals (breakfast, lunch, and dinner) are provided by the mess. A canteen is available on campus, but food prices are high. There is also a swimming pool and a separate building for the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: If you want good atmosphere please don't take admission in this college.

content.Placements: I don't know about the placements in college because I'm in the first year. But I came to know that there are only a few students who got placed. I was late for taking admission to any college so opted this but now I'm regretting the same.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The canteen on the campus is also good. They served good quality food and they have different varieties of food. I'm a bit satisfied with the infrastructure and canteen as they have enough sitting arrangements.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college because infrastructure, teachers and other facilities are very good.

content.Placements: Very few students from our college got placed. The highest salary package offered is 7.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.4 LPA. Various companies like TCS, Property Pistol, Persistent, Collabera, Global Logic, L&T, etc., visit our college for placements. Students rarely get internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and our college provides various facilities for students. Wi-Fi facility is provided to students, and there are labs, library and classrooms here. Our college does not provide hostel and mess facility for students. However, the canteen is good on the campus, and various sports and games are also conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with the college. Infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed. The salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Many multinational companies visited our college for placements. Students are offered with the role of mentoring. In our course, the salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. In our college, students did their internship from various companies, and I also did my internship from Dinshaw's Dairy Food Private Limited, Nagpur.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, all facilities like classrooms, library, conference hall, sport's room, canteen, gymnasium, medical room, etc., are very good. Every facility is provided for every student, and they take advantage of every facility of our college. Food served in the canteen is fresh and good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Priyadarshini Lokmanya Tilak Institute of Management Studies and Research (PLTIMSR).

content.Placements: Around 70% of the students were placed with the highest salary package of 5 LPA and a minimum salary package of 2 LPA. Companies inculcated were TCS, Cognizant, Persistent, etc. Everyone went for an internship during the educational era and were responsible for the study of various management section.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a great building with Wi-Fi availability and world-class lab facilities for MBA studies. There is a great library support system for the same. Sports and games are given equal importance, and canteen facility was good and hygienenc. There is a good basic facility system in case of a medical emergency.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: University Business School is the best institute.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3.8 LPA. Vardhman, Trident, Hero, HDFC Bank, etc., are the top recruiting companies of our college. Almost 100% of the students got internships as per their requirement in companies like Hero, Bonn, Vardhman, HDFC, etc. ET, manager, sales executive and any more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for MBA course are excellent and up to date. All the above facilities mentioned are excellent. The medical facilities and libraries are always available. There is sports room and court for playing games too.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: ROI is good. Faculty is very experienced. Alumni are supportive and well connected.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very active. Top companies like HDFC bank, Federal bank, Airtel, Vardhman group, ITC, Nestle, Mahindra group, etc. visit the campus for placement. There are also live project opportunities for the students in the area of marketing, finance, operations and HR to get a better glimpse of the industry.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is located at the heart of the city. Department library is very well equipped. The extension library provides extra edge for the students of the institution. Also, being situated in industrial hub provides an added advantage.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the curriculum and the placement were also good.

content.Placements: During my time most of the students were placed. I think approximately 90% of the students got placed because some students went for their family business. The highest package was 14 lac and the lowest package was 2.5 lac. Top recruiters are Indiamart, Cocacola, HDFC bank, axis bank etc. Mostly manager role was offered. Almost all students got internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college have Wi-Fi facilities and room are fully furnished and have AC in all the rooms and also we have a computer lab. Our college also has hostel facility and the food quality of canteen is good and for extra activities, our college have games room and sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The university is great, and I would recommend every student in Panjab to get admission.

content.Placements: It is one of the top universities where a high number of placements take place. Every year, almost every student is hired by many MNCs. So, I would say that it is the best university for those who want success in their lives or to give your life a better chance.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Panjab University is good. Everything on the campus is well-structured. Every department is also well-sorted. So, if a new student enters the university, it would not be a problem for them to find any department. The study area is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college has interesting activities and best faculty.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are the best, as very reputed companies come to the college for recruitments. Various opportunities are provided to students. Those students who want placements are all placed, even most of the students got offers from more than one company.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. Sports and medical facilities are available. The canteen food is very economical and good. All the required facilities are offered to the students. Hostels are quite better, and it is provided for girls.

The INSD Pune popular programmes are its BSc, BDes, and Diploma courses. The specialisations in which BSc course is offered are highly demanded ones. The most common example is of the Annimation course. Animation course students are taught creation of the Visual Effects using the most latest technologies. While INSD Pune BSc Animation students are able to work in fields such as Advertising, Film and Telivision, Online and Print News Media, or other job role relevant to their stream.

review_content.Placements: The college does help you provide where the openings are available, but they do not conduct special interviews. Over the course of eight semesters, students get to learn various theoretical and practical subjects. course_faqs.question: Is Maya included in the curriculum of B.Des in Animation Designing at INSD Pune?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, the BDes in Animation Designing curriuclum followed at INSD Pune includes Maya, the professional 3D animation, modelling, simulation and rendering toolset. It is introduced in the fourth semester (second year) of the course. Some Maya-related concepts included in the course curriculum are as follows:Introduction to Maya3D Modelling in MayaShading & Texturing in MayaLighting & Camera Techniques in MayaCharacter Setup & Rigging in MayaMaya Effects, Particles, Dynamics & Rendering Techniques

review_summary.college_name: INSD Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Animation Designing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is best but students are not coming to college and faculty members are honest.

content.Placements: The percentage of placements in college is around 70%. In 3rd year, we will get the internships. The roles offered in my course are animator and much more. The placement percentage is average in college. Many companies visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is no college hostel. Classrooms are okay and library is very small. Wi-Fi is also good but there is no backup for college when the electricity is gone.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are great. They are qualified and very helpful. Semester exams are difficult in college. The degree of the college is from Himalaya University. Faculty members are very honest and best. Faculty members are best and much better than others.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Designing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good College with below average management.

content.Placements: The college does help you provide where the openings are available, but they do not conduct special interviews. The college creates placement groups where they post the vacancies available at firms and their names. The links are not foolproof, but yes, students have to suffer.
content.Infrastructure: No hostel available, it is just one floor with multiple classes with average Wi-Fi quality, no library. The Wi-Fi works sometimes, sometimes it doesn't. The classrooms are well-maintained and cleaned every day. No mess available but has a famous food park near.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College has good infrastructure and faculty for the students of the interior design course.

content.Placements: In our college, 40-50% of the students get placements in this course. The average package offered at this college for the students was between 3-5 LPA. The college has a highly active and developed placement cell. Top recruiters at our college were MRF, Acotech, Sila, Navi, etc. for this course. Top roles offered were interior designer, product designer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for the students of the interior designing courses. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, classrooms, sports, seminar, hostel, medical, etc. facilities were available for the students. The mess and canteen food at our college was good to eat. Hostel rooms were furnished and fully maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Designing - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The best experience in Pune.

content.Placements: My overall experience is really good. All the staff members in the college are very friendly. There is no partiality in any field. I was the miss fresher of 2020. They use to take us to fashion exhibitions. They also have fashion weeks for us. I participated in the Pune Times Fashion Week. It was a great experience and I am thankful that I was a part of it.
content.Infrastructure: The college didn't have a hostel, but they use to recommend some good hostels. And the hostel they recommend was pretty good and clean, but the owner of the hostel was really bad. The food was really good the best part was hygiene.

admission_overview.title: INSD Pune Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: INSD Pune admissions are entrance-based. The institute offers several UG, PG, Diploma, and Certificate courses such as BSc, BDes, MDes, MBA, MDes, and, UG Diploma, etc. The institute offers courses under various departments such as Interior Design, Animation Design, Jewellery Design, Textile and Fashion Styling, Fashion Design, and Graphic Design. INSD Pune admissions are based on the merit score of the candidates. The application process for eligible candidates is conducted in online mode through the official website. Read the following article to know about the admission process for INSD Pune.

Instead students are selected through merit or previous qualifying exams. As such students must perform throughout Class 10 and Class 12 (UG courses) as well as through Graduation (PG courses).

admission_process.title: INSD Pune Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: INSD Pune admissions are entirely merit-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process to get admission. Find below the detailed INSD Pune admissions process :
INSD Pune Application Process

The INSD Pune application process is conducted in online mode only. Candidates have to apply on the institute's official website by using basic details such as personal and educational qualifications. Along with that, they have to pay an application fee. Students can also check the detailedINSD Pune feestructure here.
INSD Pune Selection Rounds

After filling out the application form, candidates will be shortlisted as per the eligibility criteria for a particular course. The shortlisted candidates will be called up for admission to the respective course.
INSD Pune Final Admission
Students who get their names on the admission list are then requested to visit the institute campus for reporting, verification of documents, and pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

review_summary.college_name: The Vedica Scholars Programme for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Leadership Practice - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A unique program with a strong curriculum and supportive community.

content.Placements: 80% of my batchmates are placed and the placements are still going. The highest offer received is 20 LPA and the average package ranges from 7 LPA-9 LPA. Top companies like Aditya Birla Capital, KPMG, Nestle, Zomato, HCL, Sutherland, and MakeMyTrip visit campus. In place of internship, Vedica College has shadow woman leader modules, where scholars get to work closely with senior women leaders from diverse industries.
content.Infrastructure: Although, campus is small. Vedica College offers smart classrooms with digital boards and Wi-Fi. Students can also access a digital library. We don't have a canteen, but food in the mess is of good quality. Hostel has all the basic amenities, and the hostel warden is good.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Leadership Practice - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A Well Rounded Learning Experience at Vedica.

content.Placements: The programme offers placements in top firms in India like Aditya Birla Capital HCL Zomato Sutherland etc. They have a strong track record for building a solid placement record with a strong emphasis on career growth and Industry connections. The placement support is personalised with a dedicated team supporting students by providing guidance from resume building to interview preparation.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel and Classrooms are paced with necessities and amenities that make life at Vedica comfortable. Scholars have access to facilities like - Library Mess serving three meals a day catering to various dietary preference and Wi-fi. The student life team ensures providing a comfortable living experience to all the scholars.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Leadership Practice - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Transformative learning and career-ready with fun.

content.Placements: Leading organisations from diverse sectors come for campus placements like Aditya Birla, HuFT, Decathlon, Nestled. The average salary package offered ranges from 7 LPA - 8 LPA. Approximately 50% of the batch has been successfully placed till now. Assured students are given 100% placement assurance, but at the same time, it depends on scholars how much they are willing to put in the effort. We have shadow modules, around 5 weeks in which one got to experience the whole corporate life - theory into practice with seasoned women mentors and it's compulsory for everyone. I went to Coca-Cola Egypt.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Leadership Practice - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is excellent.

content.Placements: Placement is not good this year because of market conditions. Last few years, placement was really good, but this year, they are struggling to bring in companies and good CTC because of market conditions. They are trying really hard to get into company this year.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good; there is Wi-Fi, a personal kitchen and personal washrooms. The food is okay, and you will have a really good time with friends here. The classrooms are good, and they try to do their best to provide us with everything they can from their end.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Leadership Practice - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Vedica Scholars .

content.Placements: The college placement is bad. The companies coming for placements are not giving packages more than 6 lakhs, and they expect us to give 13 lakhs for admission. The companies are also coming mostly for sales roles, as it is a general management programme .
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. The college is just on three floors and there are only three classes where we can study, which are also small. They have smart boards in class, which is a good thing and they have AC in every class. Also, they have a library, but no canteen is there .

paragraphs: Buddha Institute of Technology (BIT Gorakhpur) admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Buddha Institute of Technology (BIT Gorakhpur) considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and JEECUP for admission to specific courses.Buddha Institute of Technology (BIT Gorakhpur)offers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 89,700 - 2,82,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,28,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in this location.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department are good. Classrooms are good and the library is very nice. The quality of facilities in my college hostel is good. The quality of food is very bad. Medical facilities, sports, and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is best in GKP .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure available for my college is very bad and my course and lab and classrooms and library is very good but the quality of the facilities in my hostel is bad and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen very bad but medical facilities sports and game are good .

reviews.review_heading: Awesome college for everyone at low fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is so good as compared to related college nearby our college. Classrooms have better ventilation and are clean. The washrooms of our college are clean. The hostel facilities are so grand and our college is environment friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college's facilities and faculty. Placements are also amazing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is impressive, and the staff is friendly. Hostel facilities are decent, but, as you know, food in hostels is typically not very good. Medical facilities, such as first aid and common medications, are available for basic issues. This college is very strong in sports and games, with tournaments organized frequently to encourage students' extracurricular participation, and many of them have even won state tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this is not a good college. From my point of view there is nearly no placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but there is no recharge. Labs are good, and working classrooms are also good. However, the library is not great because they apply fines if you are there in your running period.

reviews.review_heading: For placements, having no backlogs is essential. A CGPA of 8.5+ is beneficial, depends on your skill
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of BIT College is very good, it is much bigger compared to other colleges in the area. The classes are also very good. The hostel is also very good, but the college wardens are a bit strict. The library has a lot of books, but most of them are old. The labs are very good. Wi-Fi is available for us, but it doesn't work in classes. However, the library's Wi-Fi is very good and has a good speed.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: College facilities and infrastructure are best at Buddha Institute of Technology. Labs facilities are the best at our college. Library facilities are good in our college. Wi-Fi facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in my college. Wi-Fi is installed in every classroom. Each floor has its own water supply. There is also a medical team in the B.Pharma section to treat the students in any situation. Also, every Saturday extracurricular activities are conducted. We also have many sports to play.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placement conditions and better facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a wealth of working experience. in the classroom, we have free Wi-Fi and projectors, and we also have labs for different subjects and if I talk about our hostel facilities, there are many different types of ideal and many types of technology in this, including mess organization system.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty in our college is good, placement opportunities are also good in this college.
reviews.review_text: The structure of my college is very good, large classes with windows and AC. If I talk about Wi-Fi there a free Wi-Fi in our library room for everyone who needs internet for any type of online connectivity. The hostel is good and their food is also good. There are 8 to 9 sports played in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend this college to others because this college is not accredited by NBA.
reviews.review_text: Not every class has an AC. The Library doesn’t have books according to the new syllabus. Wi-Fi is provided in the campus and the labs have decent equipments. The hostels are not good since they do not provide AC or coolers and do not even allow to bring your own fans or coolers. The mess food is also not that hygienic.

highlights.summary:
The CSAB Special Counselling 2025 Round 3 has concluded with the announcement of the seat allotment results for Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center admission to BE/BTech courses.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center:

faqs.answer: A:    On completion of B.Arch from Birla Institute of Technology Patna, architecture graduates can look at a wide variety of job opportunities in architecture and related fields. They can work as architects, urban planners, interior designers, landscape architects, and their average starting salaries range between INR 4,50,000 and INR 6,00,000 per annum. Top recruiting firms include Larsen & Toubro, Tata Consulting Engineers, and Shapoorji Pallonji, offering packages up to INR 10,00,000 per annu
faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing B.Arch. from Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna offers on-campus placement opportunities for students after the sixth semester. According to some reviews,  the college is good for placements and has a placement rate of 75–85%. The average salary package is around 6.5–7 LPA, with the highest salary offered at 10 LPA. Some say that the highest package offered on campus is 28 LPA, and the highest off-campus placement is 45 LPA .
faqs.question: Is Birla Institute of Technology Patna good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    According to a 2023 report,  100% of Computer Science and Information Technology students at Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna received campus placement offers. The report also states that 69% of Electronics and Communication students,  73% of Electrical Engineering students,  44% of Mechanical Engineering students, and 28% of Civil Engineering students received campus placement offers. Computer Science and information technology branch student has more placement
faqs.question: Which branch of B.Tech has more placements at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center fee structure for all the courses is around INR 4,27,000 to 13,18,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at Birla Institute of Technology (BITP) Patna is INR 5.18 lakh. This includes a one-time admission fee of INR 27,500, and a hostel fee of INR 66,000. In addition, students must pay the mess fee, which ranges from INR 2,500 to INR 3,500 per month. Students must pay the mess in advance of INR 15,000 and INR 10,000 for girls at BIT Patna. The MBA programme is a two-year PG course that admits 60 students. Applicants must meet the entry requirements, which include having at least 50% in graduation
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure for BCA programme in Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna is almost INR 6. 5 Lakhs for 3 years. Here's a breakdown of the estimated costs: 1st year: Approximately INR 2. 2 Lakh (admission fee, tuition fee and other charges).  2nd year: Approximately INR 2. 1 Lakh which comprises tuition fee, hostel charges and other misc charges.  3rd year: About INR 2.2 Lakh which includes fees for tuition, hostels, and other charges.   Note: These are estimates and can be slightly different based on institute’s regulations and may comprise of any other costs and charges that are not included here.
faqs.question: How much does BCA at Birla Institute of Technology Patna cost?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to B.B.A. and B.C.A. is offered based on marks obtained by the candidates in the qualifying examination. For BCA you have pass class XII examination from any recognised board with at least overall 50% marks. You also have to pass 10+2 examination with Science stream.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to BCA at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna, Bihar is a reputed engineering college that  is good for IT students and has good placements. It  has been ranked 17th in the Engineering Category by NIRF .BIT Patna has a 28-acre campus near the airport and offers a variety of student-friendly facilities . Computer labs, Library, Bank with an ATM, Health center, Transport facility, and Canteen .

faqs.answer: The admission procedure to Birla Institute of Technology, Patna is fairly tough but there is stiff competition as well. For admission, the institute considers the marks of national level entrance examination such as JEE Main for B.Tech and B.Arch, GATE for M.Tech and again CAT for MBA. For undergraduate programs minimum 50 % in class 12th with PCM is compulsory. For postgraduate programs a certified bachelor’s degree in the related field with 55% and above is necessary. Passing some cutoff does not guarantee admission into the institute since the management takes into consideration factors such as entrance test results, academic achievements and interviews. A favourable academic background and high scores in entrance examination can enhance the likelihood of admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: Admission to B.Tech at BIT Patna is based on your JEE Main score and subsequent counselling process. Here's why:Standardized Entrance Exam: JEE Main is a national engineering entrance exam that ensures a fair selection process based on a common metric. This eliminates the possibility of direct admissions bypassing the merit system.Transparency and Competition: Relying solely on JEE Main scores makes the admission process transparent and meritocratic. Students compete for seats based on their performance in the exam
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at Birla Institute of Technology (BITP) Patna is INR 5.18 lakh. This includes a one-time admission fee of INR 27,500, and a hostel fee of INR 66,000. In addition, students must pay the mess fee, which ranges from INR 2,500 to INR 3,500 per month. Students must pay the mess in advance of INR 15,000 and INR 10,000 for girls at BIT Patna. The MBA programme is a two-year PG course that admits 60 students. Applicants must meet the entry requirements, which include having at least 50% in graduation
faqs.question: Q: What is the fee for MBA at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: The median salary for B.Tech students at Birla Institute of Technology Patna is as low as INR 5. 7 LPA only. The leading recruiters are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL providing packages of INR 3. 5 to 9 LPA. The highest package of INR 9 LPA was up for grabbing through various companies including Microsoft and Amazon. Computer Science and Electronics students gets slightly a better average of around INR 6. 5 LPA while mechanical and civil engineering students get an average of around INR 4. 5 LPA. There can be differences in placement statistics year by year.

review_summary.college_name: Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Academically, the college is good. Placements are fine, but core branches do not get a good package.

content.Placements: Almost 50-60% of students got placed at this college. The highest package was 34 LPA last year. Many companies visit the college and recruit students like TCS, PayPal, etc. The average package ranges from 8-9 LPA. But some students also got less package that ranges from 3-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so vast and big, but it's good and well-maintained. The hostel is also good. The food provided in the mess is up to the mark, unlike other places. Good hygiene is maintained properly here. We have games period week. Medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are average. Some faculty are too good and genius, but the infrastructure is bad.

content.Placements: Almost 60–70% of students get placed, and most of them get placed off-campus. The college adds them as on-campus placements, and the on-campus placements are mostly from mass recruiters. Here, I have seen that they show 100% placements in CSE, but it is not 100%. It is only for students whose CGPA is above 7.5.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good, and the land area is also less, it's about 23 acres. But the library facilities are too good. The college has a large library with a good amount of books. The ground is also not too big, and the hostel doesn't have any wardrobes, which makes it too bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good option for students.

content.Placements: We do not have many placement options, and I do not know the reason behind it. Only a handful of companies visit the college for placements. Overall, if students are looking for some moderate options, then they do not have to worry about it because many students look for the options on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and it is being modified. It has been under construction for a long time, which disappointed us, and the rest is good. It has a library, hall, sitting places and a cafeteria. Classrooms are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College have good infrastructure and a good environment too

content.Placements: Our college provides the best placement in Patna. Top recruiters like Amazon, Flipkart, Accenture, Dell, etc., hire more than 90% of student get placement from our campus if they are good or average on their studies. Last year, placement was 89% onwards. So, choosing this college in Patna would be the best decision.
content.Infrastructure: We have more than 2 labs for computers. More than 100 computers are placed in the lab. We have library facilities. Our classroom also has all the basic amenities for students. Our hostel facilities are also good. Seniors are very friendly here, so there is no chance of ragging in the college premises. Mess and canteen also have various types of food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's a good option if you are not getting any NIT, IIT or any other good private college.

content.Placements: Around eighteen percent of students were placed last year. The highest package offered at our college was around 40 lacs, and the average package at CSE was around 14 lacs. The highest package was taken by a student on campus. Internships are not as good as at other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent and you will see greenery around the campus. The college is small as compared to other NITs. You will get a LAN network in your hostel; classrooms are not good, and the library is also not, but a special digital library is there.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: Admission to B.Tech at BIT Patna is based on your JEE Main score and subsequent counselling process. Here's why:Standardized Entrance Exam:JEE Main is a national engineering entrance exam that ensures a fair selection process based on a common metric. This eliminates the possibility of direct admissions bypassing the merit system.Transparency and Competition:Relying solely on JEE Main scores makes the admission process transparent and meritocratic. Students compete for seats based on their performance in the exam

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: BIT Patna Admissions 2024: The college offers admissions at undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes. Candidates aspiring for BIT Patna B.E./B.Arch admissions need to qualify for JEE Main. Qualified candidates are offered admissions based on AIR in JEE Main through CSAB (Central Seat Allocation Board)/JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority).

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Birla Institute of Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: The admission procedure to Birla Institute of Technology, Patna is fairly tough but there is stiff competition as well. For admission, the institute considers the marks of national level entrance examination such as JEE Main for B.Tech and B.Arch, GATE for M.Tech and again CAT for MBA. For undergraduate programs minimum 50 % in class 12th with PCM is compulsory. For postgraduate programs a certified bachelor’s degree in the related field with 55% and above is necessary. Passing some cutoff does not guarantee admission into the institute since the management takes into consideration factors such as entrance test results, academic achievements and interviews. A favourable academic background and high scores in entrance examination can enhance the likelihood of admission.

facilities: According to Shiksha.com, B.Tech admissions at BIT Patna are based only on JEE Main score and counselling. Management or direct admissions are not allowed.

reviews.review_heading: Academically, the college is good. Placements are fine, but core branches do not get a good package.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so vast and big, but it's good and well-maintained. The hostel is also good. The food provided in the mess is up to the mark, unlike other places. Good hygiene is maintained properly here. We have games period week. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are average. Some faculty are too good and genius, but the infrastructure is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good, and the land area is also less, it's about 23 acres. But the library facilities are too good. The college has a large library with a good amount of books. The ground is also not too big, and the hostel doesn't have any wardrobes, which makes it too bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good option for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and it is being modified. It has been under construction for a long time, which disappointed us, and the rest is good. It has a library, hall, sitting places and a cafeteria. Classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College have good infrastructure and a good environment too
reviews.review_text: We have more than 2 labs for computers. More than 100 computers are placed in the lab. We have library facilities. Our classroom also has all the basic amenities for students. Our hostel facilities are also good. Seniors are very friendly here, so there is no chance of ragging in the college premises. Mess and canteen also have various types of food.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good option if you are not getting any NIT, IIT or any other good private college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent and you will see greenery around the campus. The college is small as compared to other NITs. You will get a LAN network in your hostel; classrooms are not good, and the library is also not, but a special digital library is there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Their are so many Facilities like library, canteen, Wi-Fi, high profile classrooms. Teachers were also very much helpful and supportive towards every student. The quality of food in canteen was very good and hygienic with affordable prices and their was medical facilities also in the campus, and every year college organises the sports day for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not good in hostel rooms so students have to use Wi-Fi through a LAN connection and router but it provides less speed. Library has good Wi-Fi connectivity. Mess and hostel facilities are good. Mess serves tasty and hygienic food items.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good faculty members, infrastructure, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good and well cleaned. The hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. The price of food in the college canteen is quite expensive.

reviews.review_heading: I'm somehow satisfied with my college because of its goodwill and brand in today's world.
reviews.review_text:
Quite good infrastructure for studying and living in hostels with proper food in the canteen. Library is available for the  students to read and enhance their knowledge.
Wi-Fi is also available at the campus and there are lots of games for those who are interested.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in Patna.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Labs, library, canteen, auditorium, yoga room, and dance room are available. I am satisfied with the infrastructure. Garden is beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college life was fun.
reviews.review_text: Hostel used to be clean and clear. Rooms were good and Mess was also good. In first year two students use to share the room whereas from second year onwards single room was provided. Library was also there in college. Semester books used to be given by library itself.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private college ever in India.
reviews.review_text: In the electrical department, the facilities and infrastructure are awesome. Wi-Fi and labs are well maintained. The quality of facilities in our hostel is awesome, and the quality and quantity of food in the mess are fantastic. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: If you live in Bihar and want to pursue BBA, then you can surely join this college.
reviews.review_text: I must say that the infrastructure of this college is the best. It has well-furnished classrooms and a library. There is hostel accommodation and mess facilities. There is a lot of space for sports activities. A parking facility is also available. Labs and canteens are in better condition.

reviews.review_heading: I am pretty satisfied because the placements provided for the previous batch were decent enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. There are well-equipped classrooms as well as labs. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the quality of the food served in the mess is decent enough. Sports facilities are quite good. There is a dispensary for students who require medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: For UG course, it is value for money in every aspect except placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of BIT Patna are really good. The course and department were good, classroom and library are very good in BIT Patna. Hostel facility is available with the mess and canteen facility is available. The medical facility is good. Sports and games take place regularly.

college_info.intro:
Kirloskar Institute of Management offers a PGDM programme at the PG level as its flagship course for a duration of two-years in full-time mode. This PGDM course has received MBA-equivalence from the AIU and is equivalent to an MBA degree for all intents and purposes. The Kirloskar Institute of Management MBA/PGDM programme is offered across a total of 5 AICTE approved specialisations including:
The programme is designed as per the management education curriculum and features AI and Analytics integration as well as industry immersion and hands-on learning through live projects and internships. The programme is designed to develop the knowledge about the different business functions and skills. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kirloskar Institute of Management Harihar extends its PGDM programme in full-time mode with the admission depending on entrance exam scores such as GMAT, CAT, XAT, CMAT, MAT, ATMA, Karnataka PGCET, NMAT, etc. Though students must meet the eligibility of having a 50% minimum scores in a UG degree from a recognised university.

faqs.answer: A:    Kirloskar Institute of Management, Harihar considers national or state-level Management entrance exams for admission. The institute considers CAT, MAT, CMAT, GMAT, NMAT, XAT, Karnataka PGCET, etc. for PGDM admission. Candidates cannot get admission in Kirloskar Institute of Management without an entrance exam score. However, mere qualifying the entrance test won't guarantee admission. Aspirants also need to pass all the selection rounds conducted by the institute.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at Kirloskar Institute of Management, Harihar?

faqs.answer: A:    CAT is one of the accepting exam for admission to PGDM programme. However, it is not compulsory to have a CAT score. Candidates can also get admission based on their scores in CAT, XAT, CMAT, MAT, ATMA, GMAT, K-PGCET. Selected aspirants have to further pass Case Based Group Experience/Case Study + Personal Interviews+ Past Academic Marks +Sports & Extracurricular Activities + Work Experience.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of the students got placed until now, and the placement session is still going on. Until now, the highest salary package offered is 9.5 LPA. review_summary.college_name: Kirloskar Institute of Management Harihar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is in a calm place with a good hostel and campus life, decent faculty and average placements.

content.Placements: About 90% of the students were placed from our course in decent and well-reputed companies with a decent salary package. About 80% of the students got internships in different locations. Some of the students got internships on their own and in their own location. Marketing, finance, HR, international business, operations and business analytics are the roles offered here.
content.Infrastructure: College life was very good here, and our college was situated in a very calm location without any type of distraction. The hostel was decent with a good space facility, and there are individual wardrobes. The mess and canteen provide a decent kind of food, which is a combination of food of PAN India level.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure with unlimited possibilities for learning and development.

content.Placements: KIM has a dedicated placement cell and programs that ensure that the students are well prepared not only to enter the corporate world but also to transform into great business leaders. Even in the pandemic academic year (batch 2019-21), the institute seamlessly placed over 97% of their students, with over 40% of students joining 3 of the Big 4. The average package offered for the same batch was over 7.4 LPA. In the same year, the first-year students got placed in big companies for their business immersion (summer internships). Some of the companies that mass recruited our students were KFIL, KOEL, Amul, Outlook Group, Cargill India, and Landmark. Every student is being paid pretty well as per the industry standard.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It provides a good opportunity for students and has good ROI.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students got placed until now, and the placement session is still going on. Until now, the highest salary package offered is 9.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4.8 LPA. Our college has a tie-up with some companies like ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Satguru Travels, Deloitte, etc. Top roles, like business analytics, management trainee, senior marketing executive, etc., are offered to the students. Almost 100% of students get an internship at our college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel building is old, but the environment and facilities are good. Our college provides 24 hours Wi-Fi facility, gym, sports ground, and swimming pool for students. Food is served in the mess, and it is located downstairs of classrooms. The library is good. Canteen facility is not available.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good in terms of ROI, great faculty and nice placements.

content.Placements: Placement ratio in KIM is pretty good. 1. KIM have 90 + percent of placement record each year this year in our senior there are 50 percent student are placed and placement session still going on. 2. The highest salary till now is 14 lacs and the average salary is 5 lacs since session still going on so this figure will change. 3. Top role is business consultant, territory manager, deputy manager etc. 4. Top recruiters are Amazon, ICICI, HDFC, Kantar, Modi analytics, satguru travels etc. are few of them. 5. My course is marketing, and till now the highest package is 11 lacs and average is 4.9 lacs. 6. 100 percent internship provide to student in various company.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: If you have options then go with other one. This college is not worth for money.

content.Placements: Average. Very less number of student got placement according to the specialisation (eg. A core marketing guy got job for sales profile but in finance company so he have to sell financial products). Not much corporate connection to approach companies. Only pool placement ( only 1 or 2 companies came for interview in the campus, other students have to go Bangalore or Pune for pool campus interview). International placement - Dubai and Africa only. No FMCG companies came for our batch. Average salary- CTC (4.5 - 5) Not good for HR students, Not good for Operations students, for finance students - only 4-5 companies came, average for marketing guys (but mostly sales profile). Internship - most of the students got from college, some own effort.

admission_process.title: Kirloskar Institute of Management, Harihar Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The Kirloskar Institute of Management, Harihar admission is a multi-step process which includes application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students interested in enrolling into the institute can check the course eligibility at the KIM website. Eligible students can refer to the steps below to complete theKIM Harihar admission process:
KIM Harihar Application Process 2026
Aspirants can apply online at the KIM Harihar website by submitting an application form after filling it with all the details. Candidates also have to pay the application fee of INR 1,000.

KIM Harihar Selection ProcessAt Kirloskar Institute of Management, Harihar, students are selected based on entrance exam scores, past academic performance, Group Exercise-PI performance, extra-curricular acitivies, work experience, and more. The instittute accepts scores of any of the following exams - CAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ MAT/ ATMA/ GMAT/ K-PGCET.
Admission ConfirmationSelected candidates are given a confirmation letter. After receiving the letter, students need to pay the KIM Harihar fees and submit documents for verification.

hostel.description: Comfortable twin-sharing rooms  with modern amenities, laundry services, and a multi-cuisine mess ensuring convenience

library.description: The KIM library is a hub of knowledge with a vast collection of management books, global journals, and Harvard case studies.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Table Tennis, Volleyball courts

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Table Tennis, Volleyball courts

reviews.review_heading: It is in a calm place with a good hostel and campus life, decent faculty and average placements.
reviews.review_text: College life was very good here, and our college was situated in a very calm location without any type of distraction. The hostel was decent with a good space facility, and there are individual wardrobes. The mess and canteen provide a decent kind of food, which is a combination of food of PAN India level.

reviews.review_heading: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure with unlimited possibilities for learning and development.
reviews.review_text: It's a lush green campus spread over 6 acres of land. We have 3 hostel blocks, 1 for girls and 2 for boys. We can play various outdoor and indoor games like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, squash, table tennis, carrom and chess. We also have an in-house swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a good opportunity for students and has good ROI.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building is old, but the environment and facilities are good. Our college provides 24 hours Wi-Fi facility, gym, sports ground, and swimming pool for students. Food is served in the mess, and it is located downstairs of classrooms. The library is good. Canteen facility is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Good in terms of ROI, great faculty and nice placements.
reviews.review_text:
1. KIM has good infrastructure, well-maintained computer lab, best library with ample amount of knowledge,  24 hour Wi-Fi availability. 
2. They provide good lodging, nice hospitality, and food in mess okay type because being a North Indian student to adjust in south Indian food is some difficult but you can adjust. 
3. There is no canteen in the campus. But a shop is available that provide you everything, Evan market is just 1 km from campus. 
4. There are gym, ground for sports, sport room, sw...

reviews.review_heading: If you have options then go with other one. This college is not worth for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay. Greenery all around. But the location is not good (remote area). Campus is full covered with cameras, it feels like one is in big boss home. Medical facility is not that good. Only 1 or 2 classroom seems like we are in MBA college other ones are normal. Food is pathetic. Hostel rooms - average, not good ( Boys hostel is good).

reviews.review_heading: The campus crowd and lifestyle at this college are very good.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a natural environment where we can enhance our lives accordingly. Hostel and classrooms are on one campus which helps students manage their time. All facilities are available in the hostel. There are AC classrooms and medical facilities available in college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2017-18.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library has more than 10,000 books available on both online and offline platforms. We have a basketball court, green field, cricket field and a badminton court. We have a Wi-Fi enabled campus, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, KIM is a good choice for PGDM.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with a nice library. The classrooms are good, and there is a very peaceful atmosphere with lots of greenery. It is a very nice place to spend your two years of studies. The hostel and mess facility is also good, and all types of requirements are fulfilled here.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This is an in-house campus, and all the basic amenities are provided in the campus. Most of the rooms are dual sharing, and facilities like hot water, washing machine, induction, and iron stand are available on both the floors. The food served here is good as compared to other colleges. The infrastructure is good and is maintained properly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure with ingenious professors.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a world-class infrastructure with all the facilities. The whole college is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility, and we access the internet to explore the modules that we have studied in classrooms. The library has a wide collection of books. There are around 11,000 books and online portals which help us stay connected to books anywhere possible.

reviews.review_heading: A nice college with good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has a beautiful ambience and environment. The infrastructure is quite happening with big airy hostel rooms and classrooms. The library is full of useful books, and there are two computer labs which are open till 12 pm. The canteen is well-maintained, and there are group discussion rooms for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is amazing. We have very comfortable classrooms in our college with all the required facilities. We can use everything without any restriction. We have a library, computer lab and a sports room which is open until 10 PM. TChe classrooms are very comfortable with the good seating arrangement.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review on KIM, Harihar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. Beautiful weather and lush green campus. Well maintained and have everything you need. Well-equipped classrooms, gym, cafeteria, playground, swimming pool, squash room, badminton court, basketball court and shops.

reviews.review_heading: The ambience of the college is great specially the harihar campus. Lots of exposure provided.
reviews.review_text: The college has two campus one in Pune and the other one in harihar. These two campuses are a part of the huge conglomerate which is the Kirloskar Group. The ambience and the infrastructure is captivating equipped with the latest technology whether it be computer labs, gymnasium etc. Food available is hygienic and of good quality which is very well taken care by the food department.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best b-schools for marketing.
reviews.review_text: The college is very lively, and away from the city. There is peace and greenery all around. The college has a great atmosphere to learn and build yourself. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Other facilities like residential hostel, cricket and football ground, swimming pool, gym, etc., are also provided. The lecture hall is well-equipped. The library and computer lab facilities are available.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur:

college_info.intro: KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur has BTech, MBA and MCA as its popular programme. The College offers these programmes for the duration of 2 to 4 years on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates can apply for these programmes online through the official website. To apply for BTech, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 along with valid scores in entrance exams such as JEE Main or MHT CET. Similarly, for an MBA, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation along with qualifying accepted exams such as MAT, CAT, XAT, GMAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAH CET etc. To learn more about the KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur popular programmes, check out the table given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Repeat the entrance exam instead of taking admission.

review_content.Placements: 90% of core students got placed because TPO is from the electrical department, but 99% of CS, IT, and AI students are unemployed. In total, literally 0 good IT companies visited the college. You won't face many issues till you graduate, but you will face unemployment at the end. It's not even about skills, my extremely skilled friends are also unemployed. I agree that the IT market is currently in a bad state, but that doesn't justify 0 IT companies. Cognizant visited the college in my hometown, which is worse than my college, but not my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but the boys' hostel is horrible. First, it's not on a college campus, and second, from my friends' experience, it's horrible in terms of food and everything else. The labs are old, especially for the IT department, since no higher authority cares about the department. The classrooms are fine. The recent changes made to the canteen make it good. The sports department is not really accessible for everyone, but the ground is good and big. Overall, good for campus life but bad in labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: KDK College of Engineering is a perfect blend of engineering and college life.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placed either on-campus or off-campus. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Amazon, HCL, Mphasis, Persistent Systems, and Zensar Technologies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no student Wi-Fi, but labs are available and equipped with wired connection. There are proper classrooms for teaching. The library is equipped with a vast number of books. The food in the canteen is of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: KDK College of Engineering Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KDK College experience can be the best or the worst.

content.Placements: I am a final-year student of CSE, and the placement percentage of our college is very low. Few students get placed in our department every year, and the companies that come for campus placement are not very well-known. Companies that come include Dhoot Transmission, Vedantu, and Venture Capital.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is decent. Our department facilities such as labs, Wi-Fi, and library. Classrooms are well equipped with the latest tools and gadgets. The capacity of our library is 200 students. Sports facilities are available but not very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good and healthy environment for engineers.

content.Placements: Nearly 80 to 90% of students were placed in our college. The highest package provided was 9 LPA, and the lowest package was 2 LPA by different companies. Many top companies were visited at our college including Amazon, HCL, Zensoft, Infotech, and many more. Nearly 80% of students got internships from our course in Amazon, Infotech, and other companies, which offered junior software roles in their company.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available all over the building on our campus. Labs were also well isolated, including proper instruments. Classrooms were also available for different classes, and they had all the facilities there. Library was well arranged, having all the books and also had table to study. Hostel also provided all facilities. Food quality was good in mess and canteen. All types of emergency medical facilities were available. All types of sports and games were played on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Repeat the entrance exam instead of taking admission.

content.Placements: 90% of core students got placed because TPO is from the electrical department, but 99% of CS, IT, and AI students are unemployed. In total, literally 0 good IT companies visited the college. You won't face many issues till you graduate, but you will face unemployment at the end. It's not even about skills, my extremely skilled friends are also unemployed. I agree that the IT market is currently in a bad state, but that doesn't justify 0 IT companies. Cognizant visited the college in my hometown, which is worse than my college, but not my college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but the boys' hostel is horrible. First, it's not on a college campus, and second, from my friends' experience, it's horrible in terms of food and everything else. The labs are old, especially for the IT department, since no higher authority cares about the department. The classrooms are fine. The recent changes made to the canteen make it good. The sports department is not really accessible for everyone, but the ground is good and big. Overall, good for campus life but bad in labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: KDK College of Engineering is a perfect blend of engineering and college life.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed either on-campus or off-campus. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Amazon, HCL, Mphasis, Persistent Systems, and Zensar Technologies.
content.Infrastructure: There is no student Wi-Fi, but labs are available and equipped with wired connection. There are proper classrooms for teaching. The library is equipped with a vast number of books. The food in the canteen is of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Cool environment, but dissatisfied with sports facilities. Placements are average. Good faculty.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students got placed from the last batch, one should focus on their skills regardless of what the college is offering. The lowest package is 4 LPA and the highest is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, TCS, and Wipro. Top recruiters are TCS and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has almost all kinds of facilities, including Wi-Fi, smart boards, and facilities for disabled students, which makes it different from the other colleges.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very excellent, to be honest. They are supportive in all ways and very humble. I can't say whether you become industry-ready because now it is autonomous, so they just brought their syllabus, which is a highly industry-based syllabus. Also, teachers are very supportive whether it's studies or any personal problem.

admission_process.title: KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KDK College of Engineeringadmission 2025is based on entrance exam score. The college offers courses, such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admitted to KDKCE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers more than 10 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Engineering, Management, etc. The application process atKDK College of Engineeringis conducted offline. Read the following article to know more aboutKDK College of Engineeringcourse admission2025.

KDK College of Engineering admission 2025is entrance-based. The college also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, CAT, XAT etc. for admission to specific courses such as MTech, and MBA. Check out the following table for details aroundKDK College of Engineering course admissions2025:

KDKCE courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularKDK College of Engineering courses:
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects (45% for Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates)

KDK College of Engineeringis primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at KDK College of Engineering is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: KDK College of Engineering Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates can apply at the official website (https://kdkce.edu.in) for all courses.
STEP 2: Selection
The university considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT etc for admission to the MTech, and MBA among courses.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theKDK College of Engineering cutoff, aspirants with scores equal to or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theKDK College of Engineering feeto confirm their seats in the university.
