reviews.review_heading: KDK College experience can be the best or the worst.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is decent. Our department facilities such as labs, Wi-Fi, and library. Classrooms are well equipped with the latest tools and gadgets. The capacity of our library is 200 students. Sports facilities are available but not very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good and healthy environment for engineers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available all over the building on our campus. Labs were also well isolated, including proper instruments. Classrooms were also available for different classes, and they had all the facilities there. Library was well arranged, having all the books and also had table to study. Hostel also provided all facilities. Food quality was good in mess and canteen. All types of emergency medical facilities were available. All types of sports and games were played on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Repeat the entrance exam instead of taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but the boys' hostel is horrible. First, it's not on a college campus, and second, from my friends' experience, it's horrible in terms of food and everything else. The labs are old, especially for the IT department, since no higher authority cares about the department. The classrooms are fine. The recent changes made to the canteen make it good. The sports department is not really accessible for everyone, but the ground is good and big. Overall, good for campus life b...

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering is a perfect blend of engineering and college life.
reviews.review_text: There is no student Wi-Fi, but labs are available and equipped with wired connection. There are proper classrooms for teaching. The library is equipped with a vast number of books. The food in the canteen is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Cool environment, but dissatisfied with sports facilities. Placements are average. Good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has almost all kinds of facilities, including Wi-Fi, smart boards, and facilities for disabled students, which makes it different from the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: If you have good knowledge then you can achieve a good LPA.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure. We have playing ground, Wi-Fi facility, well cleaned pure water, practical labs, cleaned classrooms, library, etc. These facilities are available at this college. Hostel facilities are also available for away students. Mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports facilities, etc., are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with teachers and a good placement rate. It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. There is a library. Classrooms have an Educomp board, and it is one of the best in Nagpur. KDK College does not have a hostel. However, there are hostels in surroundings. There are all shops like Xerox, cafe and many helpful items.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to take admission in and it is autonomous too.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. Hostel facilities are good. The college maintains cleanliness. The hostel for girls is inside the campus and for boys, it is outside the campus. It is full of safety and security.

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The civil engineering course from KDK College provides all facilities, like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classroom, library, medical facilities, sports, and games. It also provides college bus, etc. College also provides hostel and mess facilities. This is the best college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Well infrastructure and facilities are there. No Wi-Fi is provided to students. Each classroom contains projectors. Computers are also available. Hotel is not good. No good food service is there. There is no cleanliness. No misbehave is allowed here.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent teaching and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really great. Library and classrooms are provided with all facilities. There are very good canteen facilities, medical facilities, and a large ground for sports and games. There are various clubs for games and sports. The mess in hostels is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KDK College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very old. The best part of the college is that there are two buildings on the campus. The first one is the old building with old and strong infrastructure and the second one is the new building with extra services and new infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It has a happy environment of college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at our campus in specific areas to restrict students from extra use. Labs are well-equipped with the latest software updates on all computers and also have all facilities required for students in labs. Classrooms are also well-settled and students get a healthy environment there. The library is also fully occupied with the books required for all years and semesters of students. The food quality of the mess is quite okay and canteen is also good. Medical facilities are availabl...

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur is a great college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a computer lab with a full internet connection. Classrooms are fully digitalised. The library is also available in the college. The hostel food is not good and they do not give permission for a holiday. The canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are also vaialbale here.

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering Review.
reviews.review_text: As of now, I don't stay in the hostel, but according to friends, the food is good. There are 2-3 canteens. The college encourages sports and also organizes the cricket league. The library is digitized. The facilities provided in the hostel are pretty good.

highlights.description: SMVEC is one of India’s top institutes and has been ranked by multiple national ranking bodies. In the recent NIRF 2025 release, the institute ranked #201-300 under the Engineering category. The institute is popular for its top-notch research programmes. The below article covers all the information around SMVEC rankings:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pondicherry In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, SMVEC outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the SMVEC's rankings in 'Engineering' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, SMVEC's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

comparison.college: SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering

outlook.description:
SMVEC has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Engineering (Private)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for SMVEC indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

reviews.review_heading: Experience in my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, with full speed and 24/7 availability. Labs are very big, and all resources are available. Classrooms are big and well-cleaned with digital boards. A well-stocked library is present with all resources available.

reviews.review_heading: To shine in your career, choose the best here, the best Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: About 150 acres of college with environmental amenities, and AICTE approved idea lab and library facilities. Hostel facility has been split into two, one is with AC and another without AC. Canteen food is also available in our college with good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College is modern and functional. The campus boasts smart classrooms, advanced laboratories, a digital library, an innovation hub and Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. The eco-friendly architecture includes solar-powered buildings and green spaces.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth for money because the college is so good in everything but the sports are only less.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is so excellent. They have good infrastructure and they are building the new hostel. Classrooms and labs are in a good manner. The ideal lab of the college has a very good atmosphere. There we can get so many ideas.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty, average placements and no enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructures are good for labs and the library, but in the classroom, it's average. They can't provide Wi-Fi for class; we have to use our personal devices. Hostels are not too good; they are moderate. Canteen food is also average, but prices are high compared to quantity and quality.

reviews.review_heading: Insights on Course Structure and Faculty in Computer Science.
reviews.review_text: Coming to infrastructure, I would say that it's below average. They provide Wi-Fi within the circumstances, and it's not good either. The classrooms are good. Coming to labs, it's very well-equipped with updated systems, and the library is provided with more than 10,000 books of different genres.

reviews.review_heading: I almost like all faculty member.
reviews.review_text: We have more holidays as festivals but we have only festival in college means. It is cultural basically cultural is very nice in my college. The range is nearly 1 km from the entrance and accessibility of books is nearly 1 month. The faculties and technological provisions are very good. Mostly our College support extracurricular activities more. In our college no clubs and no social groups are formed.

reviews.review_heading: we go under the technology and learn.
reviews.review_text: We have more holidays as festivals but we have only festival in college means it is cultural basically. Cultural is very nice in my college. The range is nearly 1 km from the entrance and accessibility of books is nearly 1 month the faculties. Technological provisions are very good. Mostly our college support extracurricular activities more. In our college no clubs and no social groups are formed.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with good lab facilities. There are high-quality computer labs and clean classrooms. A library is available for the students in the AI & DS block. We also have a canteen with some snacks. There are sports like basketball, cricket, and badminton. Students can join NCC for a good career.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are too good. They will give you better understanding of the concepts.
reviews.review_text: Hostel according to me deserves a one-star. The rooms are small enough to accommodate only one person, however, two need to stay in one room. There is no AC availability here. If you need AC you have to pay 75,000 extra per year for it which is completely absurd. Hostel mess food is also not that great. There has been insects everywhere in the food time and again and we have complained about it multiple times, but no action has been taken. So in my opinion, paying 200000 for this hostel is not a...

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your life by joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is excellent, but sometimes there are many damages in the roads and classrooms, which get worse when it rains. We have libraries, but they don't have a period for reading. If you are interested, you can go to the admin office, get a library pass, and use the library. Other than that, the canteen service is not as good as you might think; it feels like a scam, so choose wisely.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college which is student friendly.
reviews.review_text: There were many such facilities in the college, such as Wi-Fi access that was available. We had classrooms in all the classes, and the labs were well managed and organized with good quality chairs. There were all kinds of ways we could get hands-on experience. I don't live in a hostel because I live in my house.

reviews.review_heading: Strict college but strictness and discipline makes you stronger.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is inspired by Western architecture and Portuguese architecture. The college environment is very strict; boys and girls can not talk on campus. The college library is good; it is open until 9 p.m. and six days a week. There is no proper drinking water facility on campus; drinking water comes in cans. The hostel fee is 60,000 plus a 5,000 deposit. Mess food is there but frankly, mess food is not good and not hygienic. There is no big canteen on campus, so we can not eat whe...

reviews.review_heading: The review about my college.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure and a peaceful environment. They have separate buildings for each stream, like engineering, arts and sciences, law and so on. The labs are good but the equipment is a little bit old and the classrooms are simple and don't have projectors in them. In a library, you can't access all the books in it and its tough to take books in a library. About hostels, they have separate hostels for boys and girls but girls hostels are at medical colleges, and they have two bui...

reviews.review_heading: I got new friends and good staffs in this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel Facilities: The hostel facilities are in good condition and the improvements to the hostel are not a must. The rooms are in good condition, the hostel food is very good and the registration process for the hostel and affordability are given in the admission block.
